ast.name: desc
ast.source: A horse-sized insect with digging claws and acidic blood.
ast.target: 一只马那么大的昆虫，拥有掘土爪和酸性血液。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Make an attack against all targets in front of the Burrower within Close range. Targets the Burrower succeeds against take 2d6 physical damage and must mark an Armor Slot without receiving its benefits (they can still use armor to reduce the damage). If they can’t mark an Armor Slot, they must mark an additional HP and you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 对近距离内位于 Burrower 前方的所有目标进行一次攻击。被 Burrower 命中的目标受到 2d6 点物理伤害，并必须标记一个护甲槽且无法获得其收益（仍可用护甲减免伤害）。若无法标记护甲槽，则必须额外标记 1 点 HP，你获得 1 点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Burrower takes Severe damage, all creatures within Close range are bathed in their acidic blood, taking 1d10 physical damage. This splash covers the ground within Very Close range with blood, and all creatures other than the Burrower who move through it take 1d6 physical damage.
ast.target: 当 Burrower 受到重度伤害时，近距离内所有生物会被其酸性血液浸染，受到 1d10 点物理伤害。血液飞溅覆盖极近距离内的地面，除 Burrower 外的所有生物穿过该区域时受到 1d6 点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A large bear with thick fur and powerful claws.
ast.target: 一只毛皮厚实、爪子有力的大熊。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Targets who mark HP from the Bear’s standard attack are knocked back to Very Close range.
ast.target: 因熊的标准攻击而标记 HP 的目标会被击退到极近距离。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make an attack against a target within Melee range. On a success, deal 3d4+10 physical damage and the target is Restrained until they break free with a successful Strength Roll.
ast.target: 对近战范围内的一个目标进行攻击。成功则造成 3d4+10 点物理伤害，并使目标陷入束缚状态，直到其通过一次成功的力量检定挣脱为止。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Bear makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当熊对一名 PC 成功攻击时，你获得 1 点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A massive humanoid who sees all sapient life as food.
ast.target: 一个巨型类人，将所有智慧生命视为食物。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: You must spend a Fear to spotlight the Ogre. While spotlighted, they can make their standard attack against all targets within range.
ast.target: 你必须消耗 1 点恐惧来聚焦 Ogre。被聚焦期间，他们可以对范围内所有目标进行标准攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Ogre’s attacks deal direct damage.
ast.target: Ogre 的攻击造成直接伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Ogre marks 2 or more HP, they can rampage. Move the Ogre to a point within Close range and deal 2d6+3 direct physical damage to all targets in their path.
ast.target: 当食人魔标记2点或更多HP时，他们可以狂暴。将食人魔移动到近距范围内的一点，并对其路径上的所有目标造成2d6+3点直接物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Construct marks HP from physical damage, they must mark an additional HP.
ast.target: 当构装体因物理伤害标记HP时，他们必须额外标记1点HP。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make an attack against all targets in the Construct’s path when they move. Targets the Construct succeeds against take 1d8 physical damage.
ast.target: 在构装体移动时，对其路径上的所有目标进行一次攻击。构装体成功命中的目标受到1d8点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Before rolling damage for the Construct’s attack, you can mark a Stress to gain a +10 bonus to the damage roll. The Construct can then take the spotlight again.
ast.target: 在为构装体的攻击掷伤害前，你可以标记1点压力以获得伤害掷骰+10加值。随后构装体可以再次获得聚光灯时刻。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An ambitious and ostentatiously dressed socialite.
ast.target: 一位野心勃勃、衣着夸张的社交名流。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to say something mocking and force a target within Close range to make a Presence Reaction Roll (14) to see if they can save face. On a failure, the target must mark 2 Stress and is Vulnerable until the scene ends.
ast.target: 说出嘲讽之语，并迫使近距范围内的一个目标进行一次风度反应检定（14），看其能否保住面子。失败则目标必须标记2点压力，并在场景结束前处于易伤。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: and target a PC. The Courtier convinces a crowd or prominent individual that the target is the cause of their current conflict or misfortune.
ast.target: 并以一名PC为目标。廷臣说服人群或重要人物相信该目标是他们当前冲突或不幸的根源。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A burly vegetable-person with grasping vines.
ast.target: 一个魁梧的植物人，伸出攫抓的藤蔓。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Slam the ground, knocking all targets within Very Close range back to Far range. Each target knocked back this way must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 猛击地面，将极近距范围内的所有目标击退至远距范围。每个被击退的目标必须标记1点压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A large wolf with menacing teeth, seldom encountered alone.
ast.target: 一只牙齿狰狞的大狼，很少单独出现。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the Wolf makes a successful standard attack and another Dire Wolf is within Melee range of the target, deal 1d6+5 physical damage instead of their standard damage and you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 若狼成功进行一次标准攻击且另一只恐狼在目标的近战范围内，则改为造成1d6+5点物理伤害而非其标准伤害，并且你获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Dozens of fist-sized mosquitoes, flying together for protection.
ast.target: 数十只拳头大小的蚊子，为了自保成群飞行。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Mosquitoes have marked half or more of their HP, their standard attack deals 1d4+1 physical damage instead.
ast.target: 当蚊群标记了其一半或更多HP时，其标准攻击改为造成1d4+1点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While flying, the Mosquitoes have a +2 bonus to their Difficulty.
ast.target: 飞行时，蚊群的难度获得+2加值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Mosquitoes’ attack causes a target to mark HP, you can mark a Stress to force the target to mark an additional HP.
ast.target: 当蚊群的攻击使目标标记HP时，你可以标记1点压力以迫使目标额外标记1点HP。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A cat-sized rodent skilled at scavenging and survival.
ast.target: 一只猫大小的啮齿动物，擅长拾荒与生存。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Rat is defeated when they take any damage. For every 3 damage a PC deals to the Rat, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
ast.target: 老鼠在受到任何伤害时即被击败。PC对老鼠每造成3点伤害，就额外击败一个其攻击能命中的范围内随从。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A human-sized insect with tearing claws and a stinging tail.
ast.target: 一只人类体型的昆虫，拥有撕裂利爪和带刺尾巴。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make a standard attack against two targets within Melee range.
ast.target: 对近战范围内的两个目标进行一次标准攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Scorpion makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当蝎子对一名PC成功攻击时，你获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A clear serpent with a massive head that leaves behind a glass shard trail wherever they go.
ast.target: 一条透明的巨首巨蛇，无论走到哪里都会留下玻璃碎片的痕迹。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: On a successful attack within Melee range against the Snake, the attacker must mark an Armor Slot without receiving its benefits (they can still use armor to reduce the damage). If they can’t mark an Armor Slot, they must mark an additional HP.
ast.target: 在近战范围内对蛇的成功攻击后，攻击者必须标记一个护甲槽且无法获得其收益（仍可使用护甲减伤）。若无法标记护甲槽，则必须额外标记1点HP。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make an attack against all targets within Very Close range. Targets the Snake succeeds against take 1d6+1 physical damage.
ast.target: 对极近距范围内的所有目标进行一次攻击。蛇成功命中的目标受到1d6+1点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to introduce a d6 Spitter Die. When the Snake is in the spotlight, roll this die. On a result of 5 or higher, all targets in front of the Snake within Far range must succeed on an Agility Reaction Roll or take 1d4 physical damage. The Snake can take the spotlight a second time this GM turn.
ast.target: 引入一个d6喷吐骰。蛇获得聚光灯时刻时，掷此骰。结果为5或更高时，蛇前方远距范围内的所有目标必须成功通过一次敏捷反应检定，否则受到1d4点物理伤害。蛇在本次GM回合中可以第二次获得聚光灯时刻。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A nimble fighter armed with javelins.
ast.target: 一名敏捷的战士，装备标枪。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: After making a standard attack, the Harrier can move anywhere within Far range.
ast.target: 进行一次标准攻击后，Harrier可以移动到远距范围内的任意位置。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a creature moves into Melee range to make an attack, you can mark a Stress before the attack roll to move anywhere within Close range and make an attack against that creature. On a success, deal 1d10+2 physical damage.
ast.target: 当一个生物移动进入近战范围进行攻击时，你可以在攻击掷骰前标记1点压力，以移动到近距范围内的任意位置并对该生物进行攻击。成功则造成1d10+2点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Make an attack against a target within Far range. On a success, mark a Stress to deal 1d12+3 physical damage. If the target marks HP from this attack, they have disadvantage on Agility Rolls until they clear at least 1 HP.
ast.target: 对远距范围内的目标进行一次攻击。成功则标记1点压力，造成1d12+3点物理伤害。如果目标因这次攻击标记了生命值，他们在清除至少1点生命值之前，敏捷检定处于劣势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A creature who tries to move within Very Close range of the Guard must succeed on an Agility Roll. If additional Bladed Guards are standing in a line alongside the first, and each is within Melee range of another guard in the line, the Difficulty increases by the total number of guards in that line.
ast.target: 试图移动到守卫极近距离范围内的生物必须通过一次敏捷检定。如果有其他刀刃守卫与第一名并排站成一列，且每名守卫都在该列另一名守卫的近战范围内，则难度按该列守卫总人数增加。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Make an attack against a target within Very Close range. On a success, mark a Stress to Restrain the target until they break free with a successful attack, Finesse Roll, or Strength Roll.
ast.target: 对极近距离范围内的目标进行一次攻击。成功则标记1点压力，使目标陷入“束缚”，直到其通过一次成功的攻击、灵巧检定或力量检定挣脱。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A seasoned guard with a mace, a whistle, and a bellowing voice.
ast.target: 一名经验丰富的守卫，携带狼牙棒和口哨，嗓门洪亮。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend 2 Fear to spotlight the Head Guard and up to 2d4 allies within Far range.
ast.target: 消耗2点恐惧，使队长与远距范围内最多2d4名盟友进入聚光。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Countdown (5). When the Head Guard is in the spotlight for the first time, activate the countdown. It ticks down when a PC makes an attack roll. When it triggers, all Archer Guards within Far range make a standard attack with advantage against the nearest target within their range. If any attacks succeed on the same target, combine their damage.
ast.target: 倒计时（5）。当队长首次进入聚光时，启动倒计时。每当一名PC进行一次攻击掷骰，倒计时减少1。触发时，远距范围内的所有弓箭守卫对其射程内最近的目标进行一次带优势的标准攻击。若多次攻击成功命中同一目标，合并其伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Head Guard makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当队长对一名PC成功发动攻击时，你获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A cunning criminal in a cloak bearing one of the gang’s iconic knives.
ast.target: 一名狡猾的罪犯，披着斗篷，携带帮派标志性的匕首之一。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Bandit climbs just as easily as they run.
ast.target: 这名强盗攀爬如奔跑般轻松。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Bandit succeeds on a standard attack from above a target, they deal 1d10+1 physical damage instead of their standard damage.
ast.target: 当强盗从目标上方进行标准攻击且成功时，造成1d10+1点物理伤害，取代其标准伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A staff -wielding bandit in a cloak adorned with magical paraphernalia, using curses to vex their foes.
ast.target: 一名挥舞法杖的强盗，斗篷上挂满魔法器具，用诅咒折磨敌人。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Make an attack against up to three targets within Very Close range. Mark a Stress to deal 2d6+3 magic damage to targets the Hexer succeeded against.
ast.target: 对极近距离范围内最多三个目标进行一次攻击。标记1点压力，对咒术师成功命中的目标造成2d6+3点魔法伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An imposing brawler carrying a large club.
ast.target: 一名气势逼人的斗殴者，手持巨大的棍棒。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Creatures Restrained by the Kneebreaker take double damage from attacks by other adversaries.
ast.target: 被Kneebreaker束缚的生物受到其他对手攻击时，伤害翻倍。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Make an attack against a target within Melee range. On a success, the target takes no damage but is Restrained and Vulnerable. The target can break free, clearing both conditions, with a successful Strength Roll or is freed automatically if the Kneebreaker takes Major or greater damage.
ast.target: 对近战范围内的目标进行一次攻击。成功则目标不受伤害，但陷入“束缚”和“易伤”。目标可通过一次成功的力量检定挣脱并清除两种状态，或当Kneebreaker受到重度或更高伤害时自动被解救。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Lackey is defeated when they take any damage. For every 3 damage a PC deals to the Lackey, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
ast.target: 跟班受到任何伤害即被击败。每当PC对跟班造成3点伤害，便额外击败一个在攻击可成功命中的范围内的随从。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A seasoned bandit in quality leathers with a strong voice and cunning eyes.
ast.target: 一名经验丰富的强盗，穿着优质皮甲，嗓音洪亮，眼神狡黠。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When you spotlight the Lieutenant, mark a Stress to also spotlight two allies within Close range.
ast.target: 当你使副官进入聚光时，标记1点压力，并使近距范围内两名盟友也进入聚光。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Summon three Jagged Knife Lackeys, who appear at Far range.
ast.target: 召唤三名锯刃匕首跟班，他们出现在远距范围内。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make an attack against a Vulnerable target within Close range. On a success, deal 2d6+12 physical damage and the target must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 对近距范围内的易伤目标进行一次攻击。成功则造成2d6+12点物理伤害，且目标必须标记1点压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Lieutenant makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当副官对一名PC成功发动攻击时，你获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A nimble scoundrel bearing a wicked knife and utilizing shadow magic to isolate targets.
ast.target: 一名敏捷的恶棍，携带凶恶的匕首，并运用暗影魔法孤立目标。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Shadow succeeds on a standard attack that has advantage, they deal 1d6+6 physical damage instead of their standard damage.
ast.target: 当暗影以带优势的标准攻击成功命中时，造成1d6+6点物理伤害，取代其标准伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Become Hidden until after the Shadow’s next attack. Attacks made while Hidden from this feature have advantage.
ast.target: 进入隐匿状态直到影子下一次攻击后。因该特性而处于隐匿状态时进行的攻击具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A lanky bandit striking from cover with a shortbow.
ast.target: 一个瘦长的强盗从掩体后用短弓射击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the Sniper is Hidden when they make a successful standard attack against a target, they deal 1d10+4 physical damage instead of their standard damage.
ast.target: 如果狙击手在对目标进行成功的标准攻击时处于隐匿状态，则造成1d10+4点物理伤害，而非其标准伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A finely dressed trader with a keen eye for financial gain.
ast.target: 一位衣着考究、对盈利极其敏锐的商人。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A PC who succeeds on a Presence Roll against the Merchant gains a discount on purchases. A PC who fails on a Presence Roll against the Merchant must pay more and has disadvantage on future Presence Rolls against the Merchant.
ast.target: PC对商人进行气场检定成功则获得购物折扣。PC对商人进行气场检定失败则需支付更多，并在之后对商人的气场检定上具有劣势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a PC rolls a 14 or lower on a Presence Roll made against the Merchant, they must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 当PC对商人进行气场检定掷出14或更低时，必须标记一点压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A coruscating mass of uncontrollable magic.
ast.target: 一团闪耀的、不可控的魔法团块。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mark a HP to force all targets within Close range to mark a Stress and become Vulnerable until their next rest or they clear a HP.
ast.target: 标记一点HP，迫使近距范围内的所有目标标记一点压力，并变为易伤，直到他们下次休息或他们清除一点HP。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to transform the area within Very Close range into a diff erent biome. All targets within this area take 2d6+3 direct magic damage.
ast.target: 将极近距范围内的区域转化为不同的生态环境。该区域内所有目标受到2d6+3点直接魔法伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A living flame the size of a large bonfire.
ast.target: 一团如大型篝火般大小的活焰。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to choose a point within Far range. The ground within Very Close range of that point immediately bursts into flames. All creatures within this area must make an Agility Reaction Roll. Targets who fail take 2d8 magic damage from the flames. Targets who succeed take half damage.
ast.target: 选择一个远距范围内的点。该点极近距范围内的地面立刻燃起烈焰。此区域内的所有生物必须进行敏捷反应检定。失败的目标受到2d8点魔法伤害，成功的目标受到一半伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A crimson-hued creature from the Circles Below, consumed by rage against all mortals.
ast.target: 一只来自下方诸环的猩红色生物，对所有凡人充满怒火。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to rain down hellfire within Far range. All targets within the area must make an Agility Reaction Roll. Targets who fail take 1d20+3 magic damage. Targets who succeed take half damage.
ast.target: 在远距范围内降下地狱之火。区域内所有目标必须进行敏捷反应检定。失败的目标受到1d20+3点魔法伤害，成功的目标受到一半伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An ambulatory sapling rising up to defend their forest.
ast.target: 一棵能行走的树苗起身守卫它的森林。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Treant is defeated when they take any damage. For every 5 damage a PC deals to the Treant, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
ast.target: 树人受到任何伤害即被击败。PC对树人每造成5点伤害，额外击败一个处于该攻击可命中范围内的随从。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A moving mound of translucent green slime.
ast.target: 一团移动的半透明绿色史莱姆。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When you spotlight the Ooze and they don’t have a token on their stat block, they can’t act yet. Place a token on their stat block and describe what they’re preparing to do. When you spotlight the Ooze and they have a token on their stat block, clear the token and they can act.
ast.target: 当你聚焦黏液怪且其属性栏上没有标记时，它还不能行动。在其属性栏上放置一个标记，并描述它正在准备做什么。当你聚焦黏液怪且其属性栏上有标记时，清除该标记，它即可行动。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Ooze makes a successful attack, the target must mark an Armor Slot without receiving its benefits (they can still use armor to reduce the damage). If they can’t mark an Armor Slot, they must mark an additional HP.
ast.target: 当黏液怪成功攻击时，目标必须标记一个护甲槽但不获得其收益（仍可使用护甲来减少伤害）。如果无法标记护甲槽，则必须额外标记一点HP。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A small moving mound of translucent green slime.
ast.target: 一小团移动的半透明绿色史莱姆。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A moving mound of translucent flaming red slime.
ast.target: 一团移动的半透明燃烧红色史莱姆。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Make an attack against a target within Very Close range. On a success, the target takes 1d8 magic damage and is Ignited until they’re extinguished with a successful Finesse Roll (14). While Ignited, the target takes 1d4 magic damage when they make an action roll.
ast.target: 对极近距范围内的一个目标进行攻击。成功时，目标受到1d8点魔法伤害并被点燃，直到通过一次成功的灵巧检定（14）将其熄灭。处于点燃状态时，目标每进行一次行动检定便受到1d4点魔法伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A small moving mound of translucent flaming red slime
ast.target: 一小团移动的半透明燃烧红色史莱姆

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a creature within Melee range deals damage to the Ooze, they take 1d6 direct magic damage
ast.target: 当近战范围内的生物对黏液怪造成伤害时，它们受到1d6点直接魔法伤害

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A richly dressed and adorned aristocrat brimming with hubris.
ast.target: 一位衣着华丽、装饰考究且傲慢自负的贵族。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: All social actions made against the Noble on their land have disadvantage.
ast.target: 在贵族领地内对其进行的所有社交行动具有劣势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Once per scene, mark a Stress to summon 1d4 Bladed Guards, who appear at Far range to enforce the Noble’s will.
ast.target: 每场景一次，标记一个压力以召唤 1d4 名刀刃卫士，他们在远距离出现以执行贵族的意志。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: and target a PC. The Noble proclaims that the target and their allies are exiled from the noble’s territory. While exiled, the target and their allies have disadvantage during social situations within the Noble’s domain.
ast.target: 并选择一名玩家角色为目标。贵族宣布目标及其盟友被逐出贵族领地。在流放期间，目标及其盟友在贵族领地内的社交场合处于劣势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A charismatic sea dog with an impressive hat, eager to raid and plunder.
ast.target: 一名魅力十足、戴着夸张帽子的海盗，渴望劫掠与掠夺。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Captain marks 2 or fewer HP from an attack within Melee range, the attacker must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 当船长因近战距离内的攻击标记 2 点或更少 HP 时，攻击者必须标记一个压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Once per scene, mark a Stress to summon a Pirate Raiders Horde, which appears at Far range.
ast.target: 每场景一次，标记一个压力以召唤一支海盗掠袭者群，他们在远距离出现。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Captain makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当船长对一名玩家角色进行成功攻击时，你获得一个恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Seafaring scoundrels moving in a ravaging pack.
ast.target: 成群结队、四处肆虐的海上恶徒。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Raiders have marked half or more of their HP, their standard attack deals 1d4+1 physical damage instead.
ast.target: 当掠袭者已标记其 HP 的一半或更多时，其标准攻击改为造成 1d4+1 点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Raiders mark 2 or fewer HP from an attack within Melee range, the attacker must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 当掠袭者因近战距离内的攻击标记 2 点或更少 HP 时，攻击者必须标记一个压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A thickly muscled and tattooed pirate with melon-sized fists.
ast.target: 一名肌肉结实、满身纹身、拳头如西瓜般大的海盗。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Tough marks 2 or fewer HP from an attack within Melee range, the attacker must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 当硬汉因近战距离内的攻击标记 2 点或更少 HP 时，攻击者必须标记一个压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Make an attack against a target within Very Close range. On a success, mark a Stress to move into Melee range of the target, dealing 3d4 physical damage and knocking the target back to Close range.
ast.target: 对极近距离内的目标进行一次攻击。若成功，标记一个压力以移动到目标的近战距离，造成 3d4 点物理伤害并将目标击退到近距离。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An armed mercenary testing their luck.
ast.target: 一名武装佣兵，正在碰运气。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Sellsword is defeated when they take any damage. For every 4 damage a PC deals to the Sellsword, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
ast.target: 雇佣剑士在受到任何伤害时即被击败。玩家角色对雇佣剑士造成每 4 点伤害，就额外击败一个位于该攻击成功范围内的爪牙。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A fragile skeleton with a shortbow and arrows.
ast.target: 一具脆弱的骷髅，持有短弓与箭矢。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When two or more adversaries are within Very Close range of a creature, all damage the Archer deals to that creature is doubled.
ast.target: 当有两名或更多敌对者处于某生物的极近距离内时，弓手对该生物造成的所有伤害加倍。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Make an attack against a Vulnerable target within Far range. On a success, mark a Stress to deal 3d4+8 physical damage.
ast.target: 对远距离内的脆弱目标进行一次攻击。若成功，标记一个压力以造成 3d4+8 点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 一堆嘎啦作响的骨头。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Dredge is defeated when they take any damage. For every 4 damage a PC deals to the Dredge, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
ast.target: 掘尸者在受到任何伤害时即被击败。玩家角色对掘尸者造成每 4 点伤害，就额外击败一个位于该攻击成功范围内的爪牙。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A large armored skeleton with a huge blade.
ast.target: 一具身披重甲、手持巨刃的大型骷髅。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Knight makes a successful attack, all PCs within Close range lose a Hope and you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当骑士进行一次成功攻击时，近距离内的所有玩家角色失去一个希望，而你获得一个恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make an attack against all targets within Very Close range. Targets the Knight succeeds against take 1d8+2 physical damage and must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 对极近距离内的所有目标进行一次攻击。骑士成功命中的目标受到 1d8+2 点物理伤害并必须标记一个压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A dirt-covered skeleton armed with a rusted blade.
ast.target: 一具沾满尘土、手持锈刃的骷髅。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Warrior is resistant to physical damage.
ast.target: 战士对物理伤害具有抗性。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A mercenary combining swordplay and magic to deadly eff ect.
ast.target: 一名将剑术与魔法结合以致命效果的佣兵。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Damage dealt by the Spellblade’s standard attack is considered both physical and magic.
ast.target: 法术剑士的标准攻击造成的伤害视为同时具备物理与魔法性质。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: and target a group within Far range. All targets must succeed on an Agility Reaction Roll or take 1d8+2 magic damage. You gain a Fear for each target who marked HP from this attack.
ast.target: 并以远距离内的一组目标为对象。所有目标必须通过敏捷反应检定，否则承受1d8+2点魔法伤害。每有一名目标因该攻击标记HP，你获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend 2 Fear to spotlight up to five allies within Far range.
ast.target: 花费2点恐惧，聚焦远距离内至多五名盟友。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Spellblade makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当法术剑士对PC成功攻击时，你获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A skittering mass of ordinary rodents moving as one like a ravenous wave.
ast.target: 一群普通啮齿动物汇聚成团，如贪婪的浪潮般疾驰。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Swarm has marked half or more of their HP, their standard attack deals 1d4+1 physical damage instead.
ast.target: 当群体标记了其一半或更多HP时，其标准攻击改为造成1d4+1点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: All targets within Melee range have disadvantage on attacks against targets other than the Swarm.
ast.target: 近战范围内所有目标对群体以外的目标进行攻击时处于劣势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A faerie warrior adorned in armor made of leaves and bark.
ast.target: 一名身披由树叶与树皮制成甲胄的妖精战士。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the Soldier makes a standard attack and another Sylvan Soldier is within Melee range of the target, deal 1d8+5 physical damage instead of their standard damage.
ast.target: 若士兵进行标准攻击且另一个森林士兵在目标的近战范围内，则改为造成1d8+5点物理伤害，取代其标准伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to pull down a tree within Close range. A creature hit by the tree must succeed on an Agility Reaction Roll (15) or take 1d10 physical damage.
ast.target: 在近距离内拉倒一棵树。被树击中的生物必须通过敏捷反应检定（15），否则承受1d10点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A cluster of animate, blood-drinking tumbleweeds, each the size of a large gourd.
ast.target: 一群会动、嗜血的风滚草，每个都有大葫芦般大小。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Swarm has marked half or more of their HP, their standard attack deals 1d4+2 physical damage instead.
ast.target: 当群体标记了其一半或更多HP时，其标准攻击改为造成1d4+2点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to deal 2d6+8 direct physical damage to a target with 3 or more bramble tokens.
ast.target: 对拥有3个或更多荆棘标记的目标造成2d6+8点直接物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 一株会动、嗜血的风滚草。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Bramble is defeated when they take any damage. For every 4 damage a PC deals to the Tangle Bramble, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
ast.target: 荆棘在受到任意伤害时即被击败。PC每对纠缠荆棘造成4点伤害，就额外击败一个在该攻击可成功命中的范围内的爪牙。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When an attack from the Bramble causes a target to mark HP and there are three or more Tangle Bramble Minions within Close range, you can combine the Minions into a Tangle Bramble Swarm Horde. The Horde’s HP is equal to the number of Minions combined.
ast.target: 当荆棘的攻击使目标标记HP，且近距离内有三个或更多纠缠荆棘爪牙时，你可以将这些爪牙合并为纠缠荆棘群集。群集的HP等于合并的爪牙数量。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A master-at-arms wielding a sword twice their size.
ast.target: 一名武器大师，挥舞着比自身大一倍的长剑。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Make a standard attack against a target. On a success, mark a Stress to Taunt the target until their next successful attack. The next time the Taunted target attacks, they have disadvantage against targets other than the Weaponmaster.
ast.target: 对一个目标进行标准攻击。成功时，标记1点压力以嘲讽目标，直到其下一次成功攻击为止。被嘲讽的目标下一次攻击时，对武器大师以外的目标进行攻击处于劣势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Once per scene, spend a Fear to clear 2 HP and 2 Stress.
ast.target: 每场景一次，花费1点恐惧以清除2点HP和2点压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Weaponmaster makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当武器大师对PC成功攻击时，你获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An imperious tree-person leading their forest’s defenses.
ast.target: 一位威严的树人，率领其森林的防御。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to spotlight 1d4 allies within range of a target they can attack without moving. On a success, their attacks deal half damage.
ast.target: 聚焦1d4名位于其无需移动即可攻击到的目标范围内的盟友。成功时，他们的攻击造成一半伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Dryad makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当树精对PC成功攻击时，你获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A large corpse, decay-bloated and angry.
ast.target: 一具巨大的尸体，腐烂膨胀且愤怒。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When you spotlight the Zombie and they don’t have a token on their stat block, they can’t act yet. Place a token on their stat block and describe what they’re preparing to do. When you spotlight the Zombie and they have a token on their stat block, clear the token and they can act.
ast.target: 当你聚焦僵尸且其数据栏上没有标记时，他们还无法行动。把一个标记放在其数据栏上，并描述他们正在准备做什么。当你聚焦僵尸且其数据栏上有标记时，清除该标记，他们即可行动。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Make a standard attack with advantage against a target the Zombie has Restrained. On a success, the attack deals direct damage.
ast.target: 对僵尸已使其束缚的目标进行一次具有优势的标准攻击。成功时，该攻击造成直接伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A towering gestalt of corpses moving as one, with torso-sized limbs and fists as large as a grown halfling.
ast.target: 由尸体组成的高大集合体如同一体般移动，四肢如躯干般粗壮，拳头有成年半身人那么大。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Zombie takes Major or greater damage, they mark an additional HP.
ast.target: 当僵尸承受重度或更高伤害时，他们额外标记1点HP。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Zombie makes a standard attack, they can attack all targets within Very Close range.
ast.target: 当僵尸进行标准攻击时，可以攻击极近距离内的所有目标。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to cause all PCs within Far range to make a Presence Reaction Roll (13). Targets who fail lose a Hope and you gain a Fear for each. Targets who succeed must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 使远距离内的所有PC进行一次存在反应检定（13）。失败的目标失去1点希望，你为每个失败者获得1点恐惧。成功的目标必须标记1点压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A decaying corpse ambling toward their prey.
ast.target: 一具腐朽的尸体蹒跚地走向猎物。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Zombie is defeated when they take any damage. For every 3 damage a PC deals to the Zombie, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
ast.target: 僵尸受到任何伤害即被击败。PC每对僵尸造成3点伤害，额外击败一个攻击可命中的范围内爪牙。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An animated corpse that moves shakily, driven only by hunger.
ast.target: 一具被驱动的尸体，摇摇晃晃地行动，只被饥饿驱使。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Zombie is within Melee range of a creature and at least one other Zombie is within Close range, all attacks against that creature have advantage.
ast.target: 当僵尸处于某生物的近战范围内且至少还有一名僵尸在近距离内时，对该生物的所有攻击获得优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Targets who mark HP from the Zombie’s attacks must also mark a Stress.
ast.target: 因僵尸攻击而标记HP的目标也必须标记1点压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A group of shambling corpses instinctively moving together.
ast.target: 一群蹒跚的尸体本能地一起行动。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Zombies have marked half or more of their HP, their standard attack deals 1d4+2 physical damage instead.
ast.target: 当僵尸已标记其HP的一半或更多时，其标准攻击改为造成1d4+2点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Zombies mark HP from an attack within Melee range, you can mark a Stress to make a standard attack against the attacker.
ast.target: 当僵尸因近战范围内的攻击而标记HP时，你可以标记1点压力，对攻击者进行一次标准攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A group of trained archers bearing massive bows.
ast.target: 一群训练有素、携带巨大弓的弓箭手。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Squadron has marked half or more of their HP, their standard attack deals 1d6+3 physical damage instead.
ast.target: 当小队已标记其HP的一半或更多时，其标准攻击改为造成1d6+3点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to target a point within Far range. Make an attack with advantage against all targets within Close range of that point. Targets the Squadron succeeds against take 1d10+4 physical damage.
ast.target: 以远距离内的一点为目标。对该点近距离内的所有目标进行一次带优势的攻击。小队攻击成功的目标受到1d10+4点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to target a point within Far range. Until the next roll with Fear, a creature who moves within Close range of that point must make an Agility Reaction Roll. On a failure, they take 2d6+3 physical damage. On a success, they take half damage.
ast.target: 以远距离内的一点为目标。直到下一次带恐惧的检定为止，移动到该点近距离范围内的生物必须进行敏捷反应检定。失败时受到2d6+3点物理伤害；成功则受到一半伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Assassin is defeated when they take any damage. For every 6 damage a PC deals to the Assassin, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
ast.target: 刺客受到任何伤害即被击败。PC每对刺客造成6点伤害，额外击败一个攻击可命中的范围内爪牙。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A cunning scoundrel skilled in both poisons and ambushing.
ast.target: 一名狡诈的恶棍，精于用毒与伏击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Targets who mark HP from the Assassin’s attacks are Vulnerable until they clear a HP.
ast.target: 因刺客攻击而标记HP的目标变为脆弱，直到清除1点HP为止。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Assassin has advantage on attacks if they are Hidden.
ast.target: 当刺客处于隐藏状态时，其攻击具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Drop a smoke bomb that fills the air within Close range with smoke, Dizzying all targets in this area. Dizzied targets have disadvantage on their next action roll, then clear the condition.
ast.target: 投掷一枚烟雾弹，使近距离内充满烟雾，让该区域内所有目标陷入眩晕。眩晕目标在其下一次行动检定中具有劣势，之后清除该状态。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A seasoned killer with a threatening voice and a deadly blade.
ast.target: 一名老练的杀手，声音威胁，刀刃致命。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Assassin deals direct damage while they’re Hidden.
ast.target: 刺客在隐藏时造成直接伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to spotlight a number of other Assassins equal to the Assassin’s unmarked Stress.
ast.target: 聚焦数量等于刺客未标记压力的其他刺客。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Assassin successfully makes a standard attack against a Vulnerable target, you can spend a Fear to deal Severe damage instead of their standard damage.
ast.target: 当刺客成功对一个易伤目标进行标准攻击时，你可以花费1点恐惧，改为造成严重伤害，而非其标准伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Assassin makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当刺客成功攻击一名PC时，你获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A cube-shaped construct with a diff erent rune on each of their six sides.
ast.target: 一个立方体形的构装体，六个面上各有不同的符文。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
and roll a d6. The Box uses the corresponding move:
1. Mana Beam. The Box fires a searing beam. Make an attack against a target within Far range. On a success, deal 2d10+2 magic damage.
2. Fire Jets. The Box shoots into the air, spinning and releasing jets of flame. Make an attack against all targets within Close range. Targets the Box succeeds against take 2d8 physical damage.
3. Trample. The Box rockets around erratically. Make an attack against all PCs within Close range. Targets the Box succeeds against take 1d6+5 physical damage and are Vulnerable until their next roll with Hope.
4. Shocking Gas. The Box sprays out a silver gas sparking with lightning. All targets within Close range must succeed on a Finesse Reaction Roll or mark 3 Stress.
5. Stunning Clap. The Box leaps and their sides clap, creating a small sonic boom. All targets within Very Close range must succeed on a Strength Reaction Roll or become Vulnerable until the cube is defeated.
6. Psionic Whine. The Box releases a cluster of mechanical bees whose buzz rattles mortal minds. All targets within Close range must succeed on a Presence Reaction Roll or take 2d4+9 direct magic damage.
ast.target:
并掷一个d6。盒子使用对应的招式：
1. 法力光束。盒子发射一道灼热光束。对远距内的一个目标进行攻击。成功则造成2d10+2点魔法伤害。
2. 火焰喷射。盒子射入空中，旋转并释放火焰喷流。对近距内所有目标进行攻击。盒子成功命中的目标受到2d8点物理伤害。
3. 践踏。盒子以不规则方式疾冲。对近距内所有PC进行攻击。盒子成功命中的目标受到1d6+5点物理伤害，并在其下一次以希望掷骰前变为易伤。
4. 震击气体。盒子喷出一道银色气体，伴随闪电火花。近距内所有目标必须通过一次灵巧反应检定，否则标记3点压力。
5. 震晕拍击。盒子跃起并合拢其侧面，产生一记小型音爆。极近距内所有目标必须通过一次力量反应检定，否则在立方体被击败前变为易伤。
6. 灵能尖啸。盒子释放一群机械蜜蜂，其嗡鸣震撼凡人的心智。近距内所有目标必须通过一次气场反应检定，否则受到2d4+9点直接魔法伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Before rolling damage for the Box’s attack, you can mark a Stress to add a d6 to the damage roll. Additionally, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 在为盒子的攻击掷伤害之前，你可以标记1点压力，将一个d6加入伤害掷骰。此外，你获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A floating humanoid skull animated by scintillating magic.
ast.target: 一颗由璀璨魔法驱动的漂浮类人头骨。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Skull levitates several feet off the ground and can’t be Restrained.
ast.target: 骷髅漂浮在离地数英尺处，无法被束缚。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Skull is resistant to magic damage.
ast.target: 骷髅对魔法伤害有抗性。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make an attack against all targets within Close range. Targets the Skull succeeds against take 2d6+4 magic damage.
ast.target: 以对近距内所有目标进行攻击。骷髅成功命中的目标受到2d6+4点魔法伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make an attack against a PC with a Spellcast trait within Very Close range. On a success, the target marks 1d4 Stress and the Skull clears that many Stress. Additionally, on a success, the Skull can immediately be spotlighted again.
ast.target: 以对极近距内一名具有施法特质的PC进行攻击。成功时，目标标记1d4点压力，骷髅清除等量压力。此外，成功时，骷髅可立即再次被聚光。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A poorly trained civilian pressed into war.
ast.target: 一个训练不足、被迫参战的平民。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Conscript is defeated when they take any damage. For every 6 damage a PC deals to the Conscript, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
ast.target: 征召兵在受到任何伤害时即被击败。PC每对征召兵造成6点伤害，便在攻击可命中的范围内额外击败一个仆从。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An accomplished manipulator and master of the social arts.
ast.target: 一位老练的操纵者与社交艺术大师。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a PC within Close range makes a Presence Roll, you can mark a Stress to cast a gaze toward the aftermath. On the target’s failure, they must mark 2 Stress and are Vulnerable until the scene ends or they succeed on a social action against the Courtesan. On the target’s success, they must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 当近距内的PC进行一次气场检定时，你可以标记1点压力，以目光投向余波。目标失败时，必须标记2点压力，并在场景结束或其对交际花成功进行一次社交行动前变为易伤。目标成功时，必须标记1点压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An experienced mage wielding shadow and fear.
ast.target: 一位操纵阴影与恐惧的老练法师。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make a standard attack against a target within range. On a success, the target must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 以对范围内的一个目标进行标准攻击。成功时，目标必须标记1点压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to wrap an ally within Close range in a shroud of Protection until the Adept marks their last HP. While Protected, the target has resistance to all damage.
ast.target: 以为近距内一名盟友披上一层保护之幕，持续直到修士标记其最后一点HP。在被保护期间，目标对所有伤害具有抗性。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: and choose a point within Far range. All targets within Close range of that point are Restrained in smoky chains until they break free with a successful Strength or Instinct Roll. A target Restrained by this feature must spend a Hope to make an action roll.
ast.target: 并选择远距内的一个点。该点近距内的所有目标都被烟雾锁链束缚，直到以成功的力量或本能检定挣脱。被此特性束缚的目标必须花费1点希望才能进行行动检定。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Twice per scene, when a PC rolls a failure with Fear, clear a Stress.
ast.target: 每场景两次，当PC以恐惧掷出失败时，清除1点压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 一名转投教团的职业杀手。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Fang can climb and walk on vertical surfaces. Mark a Stress to move from one shadow to another within Far range.
ast.target: 獠牙能攀爬并在垂直表面行走。标记1点压力以在远距内从一个阴影移动到另一个阴影。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A low-ranking cultist in simple robes, eager to gain power.
ast.target: 一名身着简朴长袍、渴望获得力量的低阶教徒。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Initiate is defeated when they take any damage. For every 6 damage a PC deals to the Initiate, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
ast.target: 见习者在受到任何伤害时即被击败。PC每对见习者造成6点伤害，便在攻击可命中的范围内额外击败一个仆从。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Unnatural hounds lit from within by hellfire.
ast.target: 由地狱之火从体内照亮的异界猎犬。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Pack has marked half or more of their HP, their standard attack deals 2d4+1 physical damage instead.
ast.target: 当兽群已标记其一半或更多HP时，他们的标准攻击改为造成2d4+1点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make all targets within Very Close range lose a Hope. If a target is not able to lose a Hope, they must instead mark 2 Stress.
ast.target: 使极近距离内的所有目标失去1点希望。如果目标无法失去希望，则改为标记2点压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Pack makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当兽群对PC成功攻击时，你获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A swarm of eels that encircle and electrocute.
ast.target: 一群环绕并电击的鳗鱼。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Eels have marked half or more of their HP, their standard attack deals 2d4+1 physical damage instead.
ast.target: 当鳗群标记了其生命值的一半或更多时，其标准攻击改为造成2d4+1点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make a standard attack against all targets within Very Close range. You gain a Fear for each target that marks HP.
ast.target: 对极近距离内的所有目标进行一次标准攻击。每有一个目标标记生命值，你获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An armored squire or experienced commoner looking to advance.
ast.target: 一名身披护甲、渴望晋升的侍从或经验丰富的平民。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to move into Melee range of an ally and make a standard attack against a target within Very Close range. On a success, deal 2d10+2 physical damage and the ally can clear a Stress.
ast.target: 移动到盟友的近战距离，并对极近距离内的一个目标进行一次标准攻击。成功时，造成2d10+2点物理伤害，且该盟友可以清除1点压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Experiment is resistant to physical damage.
ast.target: 实验体对物理伤害具有抗性。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a target the Experiment attacks has other adversaries within Very Close range, the Experiment deals double damage.
ast.target: 当实验体攻击的目标在极近距离内还有其他敌对者时，实验体造成双倍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to spotlight the Experiment as an additional GM move instead of spending Fear.
ast.target: 以额外一次GM行动来聚焦实验体，而不是花费恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A leather-clad warrior bearing a whip and massive bow.
ast.target: 一名身穿皮甲、持鞭与巨弓的战士。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Beastmaster is spotlighted, you can also spotlight a Tier 1 animal adversary currently under their control.
ast.target: 当驯兽师被聚焦时，你也可以聚焦一名其当前控制下的1阶动物敌对者。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Twice per scene, summon a Bear, Dire Wolf, or similar Tier 1 animal adversary under the Beastmaster’s control. The adversary appears at Close range and is immediately spotlighted.
ast.target: 每幕两次，召唤一只由驯兽师控制的熊、恐狼或类似的1阶动物敌对者。该敌对者出现在近距并立即被聚焦。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An especially muscular giant wielding a warhammer larger than a human.
ast.target: 一名格外强壮的巨人，挥舞着比人类还大的战锤。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to have the Brawler charge at an inanimate object within Close range they could feasibly smash (such as a wall, cart, or market stand) and destroy it. All targets within Very Close range of the object must succeed on an Agility Reaction Roll or take 2d4+3 physical damage from the shrapnel.
ast.target: 使斗殴者冲向近距内其能合理砸碎的无生命物体（如墙、手推车或集市摊位）并将其摧毁。该物体极近距离内的所有目标必须通过一次敏捷反应检定，否则受到2d4+3点飞溅物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Brawler marks 2 or more HP from an attack within Very Close range, you can make a standard attack against the attacker. On a success, the Brawler deals 2d6+15 physical damage instead of their standard damage.
ast.target: 当斗殴者因极近距离内的攻击而标记2点或更多生命值时，你可以对攻击者进行一次标准攻击。成功时，斗殴者改为造成2d6+15点物理伤害，而非其标准伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Brawler makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当斗殴者对PC成功攻击时，你获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A giant fighter wearing borrowed armor.
ast.target: 一名穿着借来护甲的巨人战士。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Recruit is defeated when they take any damage. For every 7 damage a PC deals to the Recruit, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
ast.target: 新兵在受到任何伤害时即被击败。PC每对新兵造成7点伤害，就额外击败一个在攻击可成功范围内的爪牙。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A giant bird of prey with blood-stained talons.
ast.target: 一只爪上沾血的巨型猛禽。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While flying, the Eagle gains a +3 bonus to their Difficulty.
ast.target: 飞行时，巨鹰的难度获得+3加值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While flying, the Eagle can drop a Restrained target they are holding. When dropped, the target is no longer Restrained but starts falling. If their fall isn’t prevented during the PCs’ next action, the target takes 2d20 physical damage when they land.
ast.target: 飞行时，巨鹰可以放下其抓住的受束缚目标。放下后，目标不再受束缚，但开始坠落。如果在PC下一次行动中未能阻止其坠落，目标着地时受到2d20点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A snake-headed, scaled humanoid with a gilded bow, enraged that their peace has been disturbed.
ast.target: 一名蛇首、覆鳞的人形生物，持镀金弓，被打扰了安宁而暴怒。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Gorgon makes a successful standard attack, the target Glows until the end of the scene and can’t become Hidden. Attack rolls made against a Glowing target have advantage.
ast.target: 当戈尔贡成功进行标准攻击时，目标会发光直到本幕结束，且无法进入隐匿。对发光目标的攻击检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Make an attack roll against a target within Melee range using the Gorgon’s protective snakes. On a success, mark a Stress to deal 2d10+4 physical damage and the target must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 使用戈尔贡的护身蛇对近战距离内的目标进行一次攻击检定。成功时，标记1点压力以造成2d10+4点物理伤害，且目标必须标记1点压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Gorgon takes damage from an attack within Close range, you can spend a Fear to force the attacker to make an Instinct Reaction Roll. On a failure, they begin to turn to stone, marking a HP and starting a Petrification Countdown (4). This countdown ticks down when the Gorgon is attacked. When it triggers, the target must make a death move. If the Gorgon is defeated, all petrification countdowns end.
ast.target: 当Gorgon受到来自近距攻击的伤害时，你可以消耗1点恐惧，迫使攻击者进行一次本能反应检定。失败时，他们开始石化，标记1点HP并启动石化倒计时（4）。当Gorgon被攻击时，该倒计时减少。当其触发时，目标必须进行死亡行动。若Gorgon被击败，所有石化倒计时结束。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Gorgon makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当Gorgon对PC成功攻击时，你获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A horse-sized insect with iridescent scales and crystalline wings moving faster than the eye can see.
ast.target: 一只马匹大小的昆虫，拥有虹彩鳞片与水晶翅膀，移动快到肉眼难以捕捉。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Before the Flickerfly makes an attack, roll a d 6. On a result of 4 or higher, the target’s Evasion is halved against this attack.
ast.target: 在Flickerfly进行攻击前，掷一个 d 6。结果为4或更高时，目标对此次攻击的闪避减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to create a magically dazzling display that grapples the minds of nearby foes. All targets within Close range must make an Instinct Reaction Roll. For each target who failed, you gain a Fear and the Flickerfly learns one of the target’s fears.
ast.target: 以制造一个魔法般炫目的景象，攫住附近敌人的心智。所有近距内的目标必须进行一次本能反应检定。每个失败的目标，你获得1点恐惧，且Flickerfly得知该目标的一项恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A decorated soldier with heavy armor and a powerful steed.
ast.target: 一名身披勋章的士兵，穿着重甲并骑着强壮坐骑。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While the Knight is on a mount, they gain a +2 bonus to their Difficulty. When they take Severe damage, they’re knocked from their mount and lose this benefit until they’re next spotlighted.
ast.target: 当Knight在坐骑上时，其难度获得+2加值。当其受到重度伤害时，会被击落坐骑并失去该收益，直到其下一次被聚焦。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Knight takes physical damage, reduce it by 3.
ast.target: 当Knight受到物理伤害时，伤害减少3点。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the Knight is mounted, move up to Far range and make a standard attack against a target. On a success, deal 2d8+4 physical damage and the target must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 如果Knight在坐骑上，移动至最远为远距并对一个目标进行一次标准攻击。成功时，造成2d8+4点物理伤害，目标必须标记1点压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to spotlight 1d4+1 allies. Attacks they make while spotlighted in this way deal half damage.
ast.target: 以聚焦1d4+1名盟友。以此方式被聚焦时，他们的攻击造成一半伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A cunning thief with acrobatic skill and a flair for the dramatic.
ast.target: 一名狡猾的盗贼，身手矫健且极具戏剧感。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to reveal a snare trap set anywhere on the battlefield by the Thief. All targets within Very Close range of the trap must succeed on an Agility Reaction Roll (13) or be pulled off their feet and suspended upside down. A target is Restrained and Vulnerable until they break free, ending both conditions, with a successful Finesse or Strength Roll (13).
ast.target: 以揭示由Thief在战场任意位置设置的套索陷阱。陷阱极近范围内的所有目标必须在敏捷反应检定（13）中成功，否则会被拉离地面并倒挂。目标处于束缚与易伤状态，直到通过一次成功的灵巧或力量检定（13）挣脱，同时结束两种状态。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An accomplished merchant with a large operation under their command.
ast.target: 一位功成名就的商人，指挥着庞大的经营体系。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to off er a target a dangerous bargain for something they want or need. If used on a PC, they must make a Presence Reaction Roll (17). On a failure, they must mark 2 Stress or take the deal.
ast.target: 以向目标提出一个危险的交易，换取他们想要或需要之物。若对PC使用，他们必须进行一次风度反应检定（17）。失败时，他们必须标记2点压力或接受交易。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Once per scene, mark a Stress to summon 1d4+1 Tier 1 adversaries, who appear at Far range, to enforce the Baron’s will.
ast.target: 每幕一次，标记1点压力以召唤1d4+1名1阶对手，他们在远距出现，以执行Baron的意志。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: You must spend a Fear to spotlight the Minotaur. While spotlighted, they can make their standard attack against all targets within range.
ast.target: 你必须消耗1点恐惧以聚焦Minotaur。被聚焦时，他们可以对范围内所有目标进行标准攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to charge through a group within Close range and make an attack against all targets in the Minotaur’s path. Targets the Minotaur succeeds against take 2d6+8 physical damage and are knocked back to Very Far range. If a target is knocked into a solid object or another creature, they take an extra 1d6 damage (combine the damage).
ast.target: 以冲过近距内的一群目标，并对Minotaur路径上的所有目标进行攻击。Minotaur成功命中的目标受到2d6+8点物理伤害并被击退到极远距。若目标被撞入坚固物体或另一生物，则额外受到1d6伤害（合并伤害）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Hunter makes a successful attack, all PCs within Far range lose a Hope and you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当Hunter成功攻击时，远距内所有PC失去1点希望，你获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to curse a target within Very Close range with a necrotic Deathlock until the end of the scene. Attacks made by the Hunter against a Deathlocked target deal direct damage. The Hunter can only maintain one Deathlock at a time.
ast.target: 以在极近距离内诅咒一个目标，使其获得坏死的Deathlock，持续到场景结束。Hunter对被Deathlock的目标进行的攻击造成直接伤害。Hunter一次只能维持一个Deathlock。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to spotlight 1d4 allies. Attacks they make while spotlighted in this way deal half damage.
ast.target: 以聚焦1d4名盟友。以此方式被聚焦时，他们的攻击造成一半伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Countdown (Loop 1d6). When the Hunter is in the spotlight for the first time, activate the countdown. When it triggers, move the Hunter in a straight line to a point within Far range and make an attack against all targets in their path. Targets the Hunter succeeds against take 2d8+2 physical damage.
ast.target: 倒计时（循环1d6）。当Hunter首次被聚焦时，启动倒计时。当其触发时，使Hunter沿直线移动到远距内一点，并对路径上的所有目标进行攻击。Hunter成功命中的目标受到2d8+2点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A high-ranking courtier with the ear of the local nobility.
ast.target: 一名高级廷臣，深得当地贵族的信任。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A PC who rolls less than 17 on an action roll targeting the Advisor must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 以Advisor为目标进行行动检定时，掷出小于17的PC必须标记1点压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to influence an NPC within Melee range with whispered words. That target’s opinion on one matter shifts toward the Advisor’s preference unless it is in direct opposition to the target’s motives.
ast.target: 以低语影响近战距离内的NPC。除非与目标动机直接相悖，否则该目标在某一事务上的看法会转向Advisor的偏好。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A clandestine leader with a direct channel to the Fallen Gods.
ast.target: 一位秘密领袖，与堕落诸神有直接联系。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend 2 Fear to spotlight 1d4 allies. Attacks they make while spotlighted in this way deal half damage.
ast.target: 花费2点恐惧以聚光1d4名盟友。以这种方式被聚光时，他们的攻击造成一半伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When you spotlight an ally within Far range, mark a Stress to gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当你聚光一名处于远距范围内的盟友时，标记1点压力以获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A large aquatic predator, always on the move.
ast.target: 一只大型水生掠食者，总是在游动。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Shark makes a successful attack, all PCs within Far range lose a Hope and you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当鲨鱼成功攻击时，所有处于远距范围内的PC失去1点希望，你获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Shark makes a successful attack, the target must mark an Armor Slot without receiving its benefits (they can still use armor to reduce the damage). If they can’t mark an Armor Slot, they must mark an additional HP.
ast.target: 当鲨鱼成功攻击时，目标必须标记一个护甲槽但不获得其收益（仍可使用护甲减少伤害）。若无法标记护甲槽，则必须额外标记1点HP。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A half-fish person with shimmering scales and an irresistible voice.
ast.target: 一个半鱼人，鳞片闪烁，嗓音令人无法抗拒。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the Siren makes a standard attack against a target Entranced by their song, the attack deals 2d10+1 damage instead of their standard damage.
ast.target: 若海妖对被其歌声魅惑的目标进行标准攻击，该攻击造成2d10+1伤害，而非其标准伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to sing a song that aff ects all targets within Close range. Targets must succeed on an Instinct Reaction Roll or become Entranced until they mark 2 Stress. Other Sirens within Close range of the target can mark a Stress to each add a +1 bonus to the Difficulty of the reaction roll. While Entranced, a target can’t act and is Vulnerable.
ast.target: 唱一首歌，影响近距范围内所有目标。目标必须通过本能反应检定，否则将陷入魅惑，直到标记2点压力。目标近距范围内的其他海妖可各自标记1点压力，使该反应检定的难度各增加+1。魅惑期间，目标无法行动且处于脆弱状态。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A ghostly fighter with an ethereal bow, unable to move on while their charge is vulnerable.
ast.target: 一位幽灵战士，持有虚幻之弓，在其守护对象脆弱之时无法前行。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Archer has resistance to physical damage. Mark a Stress to move up to Close range through solid objects.
ast.target: 弓手对物理伤害具有抗性。标记1点压力以穿过实体移动至近距范围。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make an attack within Far range against a PC who is within Very Close range of at least two other PCs. On a success, the target takes 2d8+12 physical damage.
ast.target: 对处于远距范围内、且与至少两名其他PC处于极近距范围的PC发动攻击。若成功，目标承受2d8+12点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A ghostly commander leading their troops beyond death.
ast.target: 一位幽灵指挥官，率领其部队超越死亡。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Captain has resistance to physical damage. Mark a Stress to move up to Close range through solid objects.
ast.target: 队长对物理伤害具有抗性。标记1点压力以穿过实体移动至近距范围。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend 2 Fear to return up to 1d4+1 defeated Spectral allies to the battle at the points where they first appeared (with no marked HP or Stress).
ast.target: 花费2点恐惧，将至多1d4+1名被击败的幽魂盟友带回战斗，回到他们首次出现的位置（不标记HP或压力）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Captain’s Spectral allies are forced to make a reaction roll, you can mark a Stress to give those allies a +2 bonus to the roll.
ast.target: 当队长的幽魂盟友被迫进行反应检定时，你可以标记1点压力，使这些盟友该检定获得+2加值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A ghostly fighter with spears and swords, anchored by duty.
ast.target: 一位持矛与剑的幽灵战士，被职责所束缚。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Guardian has resistance to physical damage. Mark a Stress to move up to Close range through solid objects.
ast.target: 守卫对物理伤害具有抗性。标记1点压力以穿过实体移动至近距范围。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make an attack against a target within Very Close range. On a success, deal 2d10+6 physical damage and the target must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 对极近距范围内的目标发动攻击。若成功，造成2d10+6点物理伤害，且目标必须标记1点压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A skilled espionage agent with a knack for being in the right place to overhear secrets.
ast.target: 一名娴熟的间谍，总能在恰当的位置偷听秘密。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to describe how the Spy knows a secret about a PC in the scene.
ast.target: 描述间谍如何得知场景中某位PC的秘密。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A prowling hunter, like a slinking mountain lion, with a slate-gray stone body.
ast.target: 一名潜行的猎手，如同悄行的美洲狮，拥有石板灰的石质身躯。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Stonewraith can move through stone and earth as easily as air. While within stone or earth, they are Hidden and immune to all damage.
ast.target: 石灵可以像穿过空气一样轻松穿过石头和泥土。当其处于石头或泥土之中时，处于隐藏状态并免疫所有伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to roar while within a cave and cause a cave-in. All targets within Close range must succeed on an Agility Reaction Roll (14) or take 2d10 physical damage. The rubble can be cleared with a Progress Countdown (8).
ast.target: 在洞穴内咆哮引发塌方。所有近距范围内的目标必须通过敏捷反应检定（14），否则承受2d10点物理伤害。碎石可通过进度倒计时（8）清理。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Stonewraith makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当石灵对PC成功攻击时，你获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A battle-hardened mage trained in destructive magic.
ast.target: 一名久经战场的法师，精于毁灭性魔法。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Before or after making a standard attack, you can mark a Stress to teleport to a location within Far range.
ast.target: 在进行标准攻击之前或之后，你可以标记1点压力以传送到远距内的一个位置。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to refresh the Wizard’s “Warding Sphere” reaction.
ast.target: 以刷新术士的“护卫球体”反应。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: and choose a point within Far range. A Very Close area around that point erupts into impassable terrain. All targets within that area must make an Agility Reaction Roll (14). Targets who fail take 2d10 physical damage and are thrown out of the area. Targets who succeed take half damage and aren’t moved.
ast.target: 并选择远距内的一个点。该点周围的极近范围区域爆发为无法通行的地形。该区域内所有目标必须进行一次敏捷反应检定（14）。失败的目标受到2d10点物理伤害并被抛出该区域。成功的目标受到一半伤害且不会被移动。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to unleash a precise hail of magical blasts. All targets in the scene must make an Agility Reaction Roll. Targets who fail take 2d12 magic damage. Targets who succeed take half damage.
ast.target: 以释放精准的魔法齐射。场景中的所有目标必须进行一次敏捷反应检定。失败的目标受到2d12点魔法伤害。成功的目标受到一半伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Wizard takes damage from an attack within Close range, deal 2d6 magic damage to the attacker. This reaction can’t be used again until the Wizard refreshes it with their “Refresh Warding Sphere” action.
ast.target: 当术士受到近距内攻击造成的伤害时，对攻击者造成2d6点魔法伤害。此反应在术士使用“刷新护卫球体”动作前无法再次使用。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A winged insect the size of a large house with iridescent scales and wings that move too fast to track.
ast.target: 一只长有翅膀的昆虫，体型如大屋般巨大，身披虹彩鳞片，翅膀快到难以捕捉其轨迹。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Flickerfly makes an attack, the target’s Evasion is halved against the attack.
ast.target: 当闪烁蝶发动攻击时，目标对该攻击的闪避值减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While flying, the Flickerfly can move up to Far range instead of Close range before taking an action.
ast.target: 在飞行时，闪烁蝶在采取动作前可以移动至远距而非近距。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to whirl, making an attack against all targets within Very Close range. Targets the Flickerfly succeeds against take 3d8 direct physical damage.
ast.target: 以旋转，对极近范围内所有目标进行攻击。被闪烁蝶命中的目标受到3d8点直接物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Flickerfly takes damage from an attack within Close range, you can mark a Stress to take half damage.
ast.target: 当闪烁蝶受到近距内攻击造成的伤害时，你可以标记1点压力以承受一半伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A regal cloaked monstrosity with circular horns adorned with treasure.
ast.target: 一只披着华贵斗篷的怪物，圆形犄角上装饰着宝物。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend 3 handfuls of gold (or a Fear) to spotlight 1d4+1 allies.
ast.target: 花费3把金币（或1点恐惧）来让1d4+1名盟友获得焦点。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to weigh down the spirits of all PCs within Far range. All targets aff ected replace their Hope Die with a d8 until they roll a success with Hope or their next rest.
ast.target: 以压迫远距内所有PC的精神。所有受影响的目标将其希望骰替换为d8，直到他们以希望掷出成功或进行下一次休息。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a PC fails with Fear, you can mark a Stress to cause all other PCs within Close range to lose a Hope.
ast.target: 当一名PC以恐惧失败时，你可以标记1点压力，使近距内所有其他PC失去1点希望。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A fickle creature of spindly limbs and insatiable desires.
ast.target: 一只反复无常的生物，四肢细长，欲望永不满足。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a creature within Close range takes damage from a diff erent adversary, you can mark a Stress to add a d4 to the damage roll.
ast.target: 当近距内的生物受到来自另一名敌人的伤害时，你可以标记1点压力，为伤害掷骰增加1d4。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to boil the blood of all PCs within Far range. They use a d20 as their Fear Die until the end of the scene.
ast.target: 以沸腾远距内所有PC的血液。他们在场景结束前将d20作为他们的恐惧骰。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A wide-winged pet endlessly loyal to their vampire owner.
ast.target: 一只展翼宽阔、对其吸血鬼主人忠心不二的宠物。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While flying, the Bat gains a +3 bonus to their Difficulty.
ast.target: 在飞行时，蝙蝠的难度获得+3加值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to send a high-pitch screech out toward all targets in front of the Bat within Far range. Those targets must mark 1d4 Stress.
ast.target: 向蝙蝠前方远距内的所有目标发出高频尖啸。那些目标必须标记1d4点压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A nature spirit in the form of a humanoid tree.
ast.target: 一个以类人树形态存在的自然精灵。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to target a point within Far range. Create a patch of thorns that covers an area within Close range of that point. All targets within that area take 2d6+2 physical damage when they act. A target must succeed on a Finesse Roll or deal more than 20 damage to the Dryad with an attack to leave the area.
ast.target: 以远距内的一个点为目标。创造一片荆棘区域，覆盖该点近距内的范围。区域内所有目标在行动时受到2d6+2点物理伤害。目标必须在灵巧检定中成功，或用一次攻击对树精造成超过20点伤害才能离开该区域。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to grow three Treant Sapling Minions, who appear at Close range and immediately take the spotlight.
ast.target: 以培育三名树人幼苗爪牙，他们出现在近距并立即获得焦点。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When an ally dies within Close range, you can spend a Fear to clear 2 HP and 2 Stress as the fallen ally’s life force is returned to the forest.
ast.target: 当近距内有盟友死亡时，你可以消耗1点恐惧来清除2点生命值和2点压力，因为倒下盟友的生命力回归森林。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A living landslide of boulders and dust, as large as a house.
ast.target: 由巨石与尘土构成的活体山崩，体型如房屋般巨大。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to attack a target within Very Close range. On a success, deal 2d4+7 physical damage and the target’s next action has disadvantage. On a failure, the target must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 攻击一名处于极近距离的目标。成功时，造成2d4+7点物理伤害，且目标的下一次行动具有劣势。失败时，目标必须标记1点压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A translucent green mound of acid taller than most humans.
ast.target: 一座半透明的绿色酸液丘，比大多数人类更高。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A quadrupedal scaled beast with multiple long-necked heads, each filled with menacing fangs.
ast.target: 一只四足有鳞巨兽，拥有多个长颈头颅，每个都满是骇人的獠牙。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Hydra begins with three heads and can have up to five. When the Hydra takes Major or greater damage, they lose a head.
ast.target: 九头蛇初始有三个头，最多可有五个。当九头蛇受到 Major 或更高伤害时，会失去一个头。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the Hydra has any marked HP, spend a Fear to clear a HP and grow two heads.
ast.target: 如果九头蛇有任何已标记的HP，花费1点恐惧清除1点HP并长出两个头。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: All PCs within Far range lose 2 Hope.
ast.target: 所有处于远距离的PC失去2点希望。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Hydra takes magic damage, they become Dazed until the next roll with Fear. While Dazed, they can’t use their Regeneration action but are immune to magic damage.
ast.target: 当九头蛇受到魔法伤害时，直到下一次带恐惧的掷骰前都会变为恍惚。在恍惚期间，他们无法使用再生动作，但对魔法伤害免疫。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The sovereign ruler of a nation, wreathed in the privilege of tradition and wielding unmatched power in their domain.
ast.target: 一国的至高统治者，身披传统特权，握有其领域无与伦比的权力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Once per scene, mark a Stress to summon six Tier 3 Minions, who appear at Close range to enforce the Monarch’s will.
ast.target: 每场景一次，标记1点压力以召唤6个3阶随从，他们在近距离出现以执行君主的意志。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Long-Term Countdown (8). Spend a Fear to activate after the Monarch’s desire for war is first revealed. When it triggers, the Monarch has a reason to rally the nation to war and the support to act on that reason. You gain 1d4 Fear.
ast.target: 长期倒计时（8）。在君主的战争欲望首次显露后，花费1点恐惧以启动。触发时，君主拥有动员全国开战的理由以及付诸行动的支持。你获得1d4点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A knight with huge, majestic antlers wearing armor made of dangerous thorns.
ast.target: 一名拥有巨大威严鹿角的骑士，身穿由危险荆棘制成的铠甲。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Knight succeeds on a standard attack from above a target, they deal 3d12+3 physical damage instead of their standard damage.
ast.target: 当骑士从目标上方进行标准攻击并成功时，造成3d12+3点物理伤害，代替其标准伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make an attack against all targets within Very Close range. Targets the Knight succeeds against take physical damage equal to 3d4 + the target’s Major threshold.
ast.target: 对所有处于极近距离的目标进行攻击。骑士成功命中的目标受到等于3d4 + 目标 Major 阈值的物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Knight takes damage from an attack within Melee range, you can mark a Stress to deal 1d10+5 physical damage to the attacker.
ast.target: 当骑士受到近战范围内攻击的伤害时，你可以标记1点压力，对攻击者造成1d10+5点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 一棵结实的活体古树。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to Root the Treant in place. The Treant is Restrained while Rooted, and can end this eff ect instead of moving while they are spotlighted. While Rooted, the Treant has resistance to physical damage.
ast.target: 使树人原地扎根。树人在扎根时处于束缚状态，并且在被聚焦时可以结束此效果而不是移动。扎根期间，树人对物理伤害具有抗性。

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 一株小巧的有感知的树苗。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Sapling is defeated when they take any damage. For every 6 damage a PC deals to the Sapling, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
ast.target: 树苗在受到任何伤害时即被击败。PC每对树苗造成6点伤害，就额外击败一个在攻击成功范围内的随从。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A captivating undead dressed in aristocratic finery.
ast.target: 一名迷人的亡灵，身着华贵的贵族服饰。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Vampire makes a successful attack, all PCs within Far range lose a Hope and you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当吸血鬼攻击成功时，所有处于远距离的PC失去1点希望，你获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A creature who moves into Melee range of the Vampire must make an Instinct Reaction Roll. On a failure, you gain 1d4 Fear.
ast.target: 进入吸血鬼近战范围的生物必须进行一次本能反应掷骰。失败时，你获得1d4点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Vampire is within Melee range of an ally, they can cause the ally to mark a HP. The Vampire then clears a HP.
ast.target: 当吸血鬼处于盟友的近战范围内时，他们可以使该盟友标记1点HP。随后吸血鬼清除1点HP。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend 2 Fear to summon 1d4 Vampires, who appear at Far range and immediately take the spotlight.
ast.target: 花费2点恐惧召唤1d4个吸血鬼，他们在远距离出现并立即获得聚光。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Vampire is spotlighted, roll a d8. On a result of 6 or higher, all targets within Very Close range must mark a HP.
ast.target: 当吸血鬼被聚焦时，掷1d8。结果为6或更高时，所有处于极近距离的目标必须标记1点HP。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An intelligent undead with blood-stained lips and a predator’s smile.
ast.target: 一名聪慧的亡灵，嘴唇沾血，露出捕食者般的微笑。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Make an attack against a target within Melee range. On a success, deal 5d4 physical damage. A target who marks HP from this attack loses a Hope and must mark a Stress. The Vampire then clears a HP.
ast.target: 对近战范围内的一个目标进行攻击。若成功，造成 5d4 点物理伤害。因本次攻击标记 HP 的目标失去 1 点希望并必须标记 1 点压力。随后吸血鬼清除 1 点 HP。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Vampire takes physical damage, you can spend a Fear to take half damage.
ast.target: 当吸血鬼受到物理伤害时，你可以消耗 1 点恐惧以承受一半伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A boxy, dust-covered construct with thick metallic swinging doors on their torso.
ast.target: 一个方方正正、布满灰尘的构装体，躯干上有厚重的金属摆动门。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make an attack against a target within Very Close range. On a success, the target is Restrained within the Gaoler until freed with a successful Strength Roll (18). While Restrained, the target can only attack the Gaoler.
ast.target: 对极近距离内的一个目标发动攻击。若成功，目标被狱卒拘束，直到通过成功的力量检定（18）解脱。在被拘束期间，目标只能攻击狱卒。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A dust-covered golden construct with boxy limbs and a huge mace for a hand.
ast.target: 一个布满灰尘的金色构装体，四肢方正，一只手是巨大的钉头锤。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Targets who take damage from the Sentinel’s standard attack are knocked back to Very Close range.
ast.target: 受到哨兵标准攻击伤害的目标会被击退到极近距离。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to choose a target within Very Close range to focus on. That target has disadvantage on attack rolls when they’re within Very Close range of the Sentinel. The Sentinel can only focus on one target at a time.
ast.target: 选择极近距离内的一个目标进行专注。当该目标处于哨兵的极近距离时，其攻击检定具有劣势。哨兵一次只能专注一个目标。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to lob explosive magic at a point within Far range. All targets within Very Close range of that point must make an Agility Reaction Roll. Targets who fail take 2d8+20 magic damage and are knocked back to Close range. Targets who succeed take half damage and aren’t knocked back.
ast.target: 向远距离内的一点投掷爆裂魔法。该点极近距离内的所有目标必须进行敏捷反应检定。失败者受到 2d8+20 点魔法伤害并被击退到近距离。成功者受到一半伤害且不会被击退。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Sentinel makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当哨兵对一名 PC 发动成功攻击时，你获得 1 点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A massive living turret with reinforced armor and twelve pistondriven mechanical legs.
ast.target: 一座巨大的活体炮塔，拥有强化装甲和十二条活塞驱动的机械腿。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When you spotlight the Turret and they don’t have a token on their stat block, they can’t make a standard attack. Place a token on their stat block and describe what they’re preparing to do. When you spotlight the Turret and they have a token on their stat block, clear the token and they can attack.
ast.target: 当你聚焦炮塔且其属性块上没有指示物时，它无法进行标准攻击。在其属性块上放置一个指示物，并描述它正在准备做什么。当你聚焦炮塔且其属性块上有指示物时，清除该指示物，它即可攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to Mark a target within Far range until the Turret is destroyed or the Marked target becomes Hidden. While the target is Marked, their Evasion is halved.
ast.target: 标记远距离内的一个目标，直到炮塔被摧毁或被标记的目标进入隐藏状态。当目标被标记时，其闪避值减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When another adversary deals damage to a target within Far range of the Turret, you can mark a Stress to add the Turret’s standard attack damage to the damage roll.
ast.target: 当另一名对手对炮塔远距离范围内的一个目标造成伤害时，你可以标记 1 点压力，将炮塔的标准攻击伤害加入伤害检定。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Turret is destroyed, they explode. All targets within Close range must make an Agility Reaction Roll. Targets who fail take 3d20 physical damage. Targets who succeed take half damage.
ast.target: 当炮塔被摧毁时，它会爆炸。近距离内的所有目标必须进行敏捷反应检定。失败者受到 3d20 点物理伤害。成功者受到一半伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A glacier-blue dragon with four powerful limbs and frost-tinged wings.
ast.target: 一条冰川蓝的巨龙，拥有四条强壮的肢体和带霜的双翼。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If a target damaged by the Dragon doesn’t mark an Armor Slot to reduce the damage, they must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 如果被巨龙伤害的目标未标记护甲槽以减伤，则必须标记 1 点压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a PC rolls with Fear while within Far range of the Dragon, they lose a Hope.
ast.target: 当一名 PC 在巨龙的远距离范围内以恐惧进行检定时，他们失去 1 点希望。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend 2 Fear to release an icy whorl in front of the Dragon within Close range. All targets in this area must make an Agility Reaction Roll. Targets who fail take 4d6+5 magic damage and are Restrained by ice until they break free with a successful Strength Roll. Targets who succeed must mark 2 Stress or take half damage.
ast.target: 消耗 2 点恐惧，在巨龙前方的近距离范围内释放一股冰旋。该区域内所有目标必须进行敏捷反应检定。失败者受到 4d6+5 点魔法伤害并被冰拘束，直到通过成功的力量检定挣脱。成功者必须标记 2 点压力或承受一半伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a creature makes a successful attack against the Dragon from within Very Close range, they must mark a Stress and become Chilled until their next rest or they clear a Stress. While they are Chilled, they have disadvantage on attack rolls.
ast.target: 当一个生物在极近距离内对巨龙发动成功攻击时，其必须标记 1 点压力并变为冰冷状态，直到其下次休息或清除 1 点压力。在冰冷状态下，其攻击检定具有劣势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Dragon makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当巨龙对一名 PC 发动成功攻击时，你获得 1 点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A decaying mage adorned in dark, tattered robes.
ast.target: 一名腐朽的法师，身披破旧的黑色长袍。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to spotlight 1d4 allies. Attacks they make while spotlighted in this way deal half damage, or full damage if you spend a Fear.
ast.target: 聚焦 1d4 名盟友。以此方式被聚焦时，他们的攻击造成一半伤害，若你消耗 1 点恐惧则造成全额伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mark 2 Stress to cause all targets within Far range to make a Strength Reaction Roll. Targets who fail take 2d20+12 magic damage and you gain a Fear. Targets who succeed take half damage. A target who marks 2 or more HP must also mark 2 Stress and becomes Vulnerable until they roll with Hope.
ast.target: 标记 2 点压力，使远距离范围内所有目标进行力量反应检定。失败者受到 2d20+12 点魔法伤害，你获得 1 点恐惧。成功者受到一半伤害。标记了 2 点或以上 HP 的目标还必须标记 2 点压力并变为易伤，直到其以希望进行检定。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to summon a Zombie Legion, which appears at Close range and immediately takes the spotlight.
ast.target: 召唤一支僵尸军团，它在近距离出现并立即获得聚焦。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Countdown (Loop 2d6). When the Necromancer has marked 6 or more of their HP, activate the countdown. When it triggers, deal 2d10+6 direct magic damage to a target within Close range. The Necromancer then clears a number of Stress or HP equal to the number of HP marked by the target from this attack.
ast.target: 倒计时（循环 2d6）。当死灵法师已标记 6 点或更多 HP 时，启动倒计时。触发时，对近距离内一个目标造成 2d10+6 点直接魔法伤害。随后死灵法师清除的压力或 HP 数量等于该目标因本次攻击标记的 HP 数量。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A cursed soul bound to the Fallen’s will.
ast.target: 被堕落者意志束缚的受诅咒灵魂。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Shock Troop is defeated when they take any damage. For every 12 damage a PC deals to the Shock Troop, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
ast.target: 突击兵在受到任何伤害时即被击败。PC每对突击兵造成12点伤害，额外击败一个在该攻击可成功命中的射程内的随从。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a PC marks HP from an attack by the Shock Troop, they lose a Hope.
ast.target: 当PC因突击兵的攻击标记HP时，他们失去一个希望。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A powerful mage bound by the bargains they made in life.
ast.target: 被生前交易所束缚的强大法师。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to unleash an all-consuming firestorm and make an attack against all targets within Close range. Targets the Sorcerer succeeds against take 2d10+6 direct magic damage.
ast.target: 以释放吞噬一切的火焰风暴，并对近距范围内所有目标进行一次攻击。巫师成功命中的目标受到2d10+6点直接魔法伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to trap a target within Far range in a powerful illusion of their worst fears. While trapped, the target is Restrained and Vulnerable until they break free, ending both conditions, with a successful Instinct Roll.
ast.target: 以将远距范围内的一个目标困于其最深恐惧的强大幻象中。被困期间，目标处于束缚与易伤状态，直到他们以成功的本能检定挣脱，结束这两种状态。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Sorcerer takes damage from an attack, they can teleport up to Far range.
ast.target: 当巫师受到攻击伤害时，他们可以传送最多到远距范围。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Countdown (Loop 2d6). When the Sorcerer is in the spotlight for the first time, activate the countdown. When it triggers, all targets within Far range become Vulnerable and must mark a Stress as they relive their greatest regrets. A target can break free from their regret with a successful Presence or Strength Roll. When a PC fails to break free, they lose a Hope.
ast.target: 倒计时（循环2d6）。当巫师首次成为焦点时，启动倒计时。当倒计时触发时，远距范围内所有目标变为易伤，并在重温他们最深的悔恨时必须标记压力。目标可通过成功的风度或力量检定摆脱悔恨。当PC未能摆脱时，他们失去一个希望。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A Fallen God, wreathed in rage and resentment, bearing millennia of experience in breaking heroes’ spirits.
ast.target: 一位堕落之神，缠绕在愤怒与怨恨中，拥有千年的摧毁英雄意志的经验。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Realm-Breaker takes damage, reduce it by 2d10.
ast.target: 当界域破坏者受到伤害时，将其减少2d10。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make a standard attack against all targets within Very Close range. When a target uses armor to reduce damage from this attack, they must mark 2 Armor Slots.
ast.target: 以对极近范围内所有目标进行一次标准攻击。当目标用护甲减少此攻击的伤害时，必须标记2个护甲槽位。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a target marks HP from an attack by the Realm-Breaker, all PCs within Far range of the target must lose a Hope.
ast.target: 当目标因界域破坏者的攻击标记HP时，目标远距范围内的所有PC必须失去一个希望。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: That which only the most feared have a chance to fear.
ast.target: 唯有最令人畏惧者才可能畏惧之物。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Undefeated Champion takes damage, reduce it by 1d10.
ast.target: 当不败冠军受到伤害时，将其减少1d10。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make a standard attack against all targets within Very Close range. PCs the Champion succeeds against lose a number of Hope equal to the HP they marked from this attack.
ast.target: 以对极近范围内所有目标进行一次标准攻击。冠军成功命中的PC失去等同于其因该攻击标记HP数量的希望。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to summon a number of Fallen Shock Troops equal to twice the number of PCs. The Shock Troops appear at Far range.
ast.target: 以召唤数量为PC人数两倍的堕落突击兵。突击兵出现在远距范围。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Undefeated Champion makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当不败冠军对PC进行一次成功攻击时，你获得一个恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a target marks HP from an attack by the Undefeated Champion, all PCs within Far range of the target lose a Hope.
ast.target: 当目标因不败冠军的攻击标记HP时，目标远距范围内的所有PC失去一个希望。

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 持受圣弓的灵体士兵。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Archer deals double damage to targets marked Guilty by a High Seraph.
ast.target: 弓手对被高阶炽天使标记为有罪的目标造成双倍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make a standard attack against up to three targets.
ast.target: 以对至多三个目标进行一次标准攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Souls of the faithful, lifted up with divine weaponry.
ast.target: 被神圣武器抬升的虔信之魂。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Soldier is defeated when they take any damage. For every 13 damage a PC deals to the Soldier, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
ast.target: 士兵在受到任何伤害时即被击败。PC每对士兵造成13点伤害，额外击败一个在该攻击可成功命中的射程内的随从。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While the Soldier is flying, spend a Fear to move up to Far range instead of Close range before taking an action.
ast.target: 当士兵在飞行时，在采取行动前花费一个恐惧，将移动距离提升至远距范围而非近距范围。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A divine champion, head of a hallowed host of warriors who enforce their god’s will.
ast.target: 一位神圣冠军，率领一支神圣武士军团贯彻其神祇意志。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While the Seraph is flying, spend a Fear to move up to Far range instead of Close range before taking an action.
ast.target: 当炽天使在飞行时，在进行动作前花费1点恐惧，将移动距离提升至远距而非近距。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make a target Guilty in the eyes of the Seraph’s god until the Seraph is defeated. While Guilty, the target doesn’t gain Hope on a result with Hope. When the Seraph succeeds on a standard attack against a Guilty target, they deal Severe damage instead of their standard damage. The Seraph can only mark one target at a time.
ast.target: 使一个目标在炽天使的神眼中变为 Guilty，直到炽天使被击败。处于 Guilty 时，目标在带有 Hope 的结果上不会获得希望。当炽天使对 Guilty 目标进行标准攻击并成功时，造成重度伤害而非标准伤害。炽天使一次只能标记一个目标。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to reflect a sliver of divinity as a searing beam of light that hits up to twenty targets within Very Far range. Targets must make a Presence Reaction Roll, with disadvantage if they are marked Guilty. Targets who fail take 4d6+12 magic damage. Targets who succeed take half damage.
ast.target: 将一丝神性反射为灼热光束，打击极远距内至多二十个目标。目标必须进行 Presence Reaction Roll，若被标记为 Guilty 则带有劣势。失败者承受 4d6+12 魔法伤害。成功者承受一半伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Once per scene, spend a Fear to spotlight all other adversaries within Far range. Attacks they make while spotlighted in this way deal half damage.
ast.target: 每场景一次，花费1点恐惧，为远距内的所有其他敌人打上聚光。被如此聚光时，他们的攻击造成一半伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A legendary beast of the sea, bigger than the largest galleon, with sucker-laden tentacles and a terrifying maw.
ast.target: 传说中的海兽，比最大的大帆船还要巨大，触手布满吸盘，巨口骇人。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While the Kraken has 7 or fewer marked HP, they can make their standard attack against two targets within range.
ast.target: 当克拉肯标记的 HP 不超过7时，他们可以对射程内两个目标进行标准攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to spew a line of boiling water at any number of targets in a line up to Far range. All targets must succeed on an Agility Reaction Roll or take 4d6+9 physical damage. If a target marks an Armor Slot to reduce the damage, they must also mark a Stress.
ast.target: 向远距内一条直线上任意数量的目标喷射沸水。所有目标必须通过 Agility Reaction Roll，否则承受 4d6+9 物理伤害。若目标标记一个 Armor Slot 以减少伤害，还必须标记一个 Stress。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Kraken makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当克拉肯对一名 PC 攻击成功时，你获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A towering immortal and incarnation of fate, cursed to only see bad outcomes.
ast.target: 高耸的不朽者与命运的化身，被诅咒只能看见坏结果。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Oracle makes a successful attack, all PCs within Far range lose a Hope and you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当神谕者攻击成功时，远距内的所有 PC 失去1点希望，你获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a creature rolls a failure while within Very Far range of the Oracle, they must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 当生物在神谕者极远距内掷出失败时，必须标记一个 Stress。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to present a target within Far range with a vision of their personal nightmare. The target must make a Knowledge Reaction Roll. On a failure, they lose all Hope and take 2d20+4 direct magic damage. On a success, they take half damage and lose a Hope.
ast.target: 向远距内的目标呈现其个人噩梦的幻象。目标必须进行 Knowledge Reaction Roll。失败则失去所有希望并承受 2d20+4 直接魔法伤害。成功则承受一半伤害并失去1点希望。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Once per day, spend 2 Fear to summon 2d4 Tier 2 or below Minions relevant to one of the PC’s personal nightmares. They appear at Close range relative to that PC.
ast.target: 每日一次，花费2点恐惧召唤 2d4 个与某位 PC 的个人噩梦相关的 2 阶或以下 Minion。它们出现于相对该 PC 的近距。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Oracle sees a mortal creature, they instantly know one of their personal nightmares.
ast.target: 当神谕者看到一个凡人时，会立刻知晓其一个个人噩梦。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Oracle marks HP from an attack within Very Close range, you can mark a Stress to knock the attacker back to Far range and deal 2d10+4 physical damage.
ast.target: 当神谕者因极近距内的攻击而标记 HP 时，你可以标记一个 Stress，将攻击者击退至远距并造成 2d10+4 物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A chaotic mockery of life, constantly in flux.
ast.target: 生命的混沌嘲弄体，始终处于变动之中。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Abomination attacks, roll 2d4 and use the result as their attack modifier.
ast.target: 当憎恶体攻击时，掷 2d4，并将结果作为其攻击修正值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a target takes damage from the Abomination, they must make an Instinct Reaction Roll. On a failure, they gain disadvantage on their next action roll and you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当目标受到憎恶体伤害时，必须进行 Instinct Reaction Roll。失败则其下一次行动检定带有劣势，你获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to rattle the edges of reality within Far range of the Abomination. All targets within that area must succeed on a Knowledge Reaction Roll or become Unstuck from reality until the end of the scene. When an Unstuck target spends Hope or marks Armor Slots, HP, or Stress, they must double the amount spent or marked.
ast.target: 震动憎恶体远距内现实的边界。该区域内所有目标必须通过 Knowledge Reaction Roll，否则将从现实中变为 Unstuck 直到场景结束。当 Unstuck 目标花费希望或标记 Armor Slots、HP 或 Stress 时，必须将花费或标记的数量加倍。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a PC takes damage from the Corrupter, they lose a Hope.
ast.target: 当 PC 受到堕化者的伤害时，失去1点希望。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to spew partially digested portions of consumed realities at all targets within Close range. Targets must succeed on a Knowledge Reaction Roll or mark 2 Stress.
ast.target: 向近距内所有目标喷吐已被吞噬现实的半消化碎片。目标必须通过 Knowledge Reaction Roll，否则标记2个 Stress。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Thrall is defeated when they take any damage. For every 13 damage a PC deals to the Thrall, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
ast.target: 奴仆一旦受到任何伤害便被击败。PC 每对奴仆造成 13 点伤害，就额外击败一个攻击能够命中的射程内 Minion。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Enraged by their wounds, the dragon bursts into molten lava.
ast.target: 因伤势而狂怒，巨龙爆裂成熔融岩浆。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Molten Scourge takes damage, roll a number of d6s equal to HP marked. For each result of 4 or higher, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当熔火天灾受到伤害时，掷出等同于标记 HP 数量的 d6。每有一个结果为 4 或更高，你获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
