ast.source: to make an attack against a target within Very Close range. On a success, the target takes 4d8+1 physical damage, loses a Hope, and is knocked back to Close range. The Molten Scourge clears a Stress.
ast.target: 对极近距内的目标进行一次攻击。成功时，目标承受 4d8+1 物理伤害，失去1点希望，并被击退至近距。熔火天灾清除一个 Stress。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Molten Scourge takes Severe damage from an attack within Very Close range, molten blood gushes from the wound and deals 2d10+4 direct physical damage to the attacker.
ast.target: 当熔火灾祸在极近距离内受到攻击并承受严重伤害时，炽热的血液从伤口喷涌而出，对攻击者造成2d10+4点直接物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A massive winged creature with obsidian scales and impossibly sharp claws.
ast.target: 一只巨大的有翼生物，覆有黑曜鳞片，利爪锋利得不可思议。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While flying, the Obsidian Predator gains a +3 bonus to their Difficulty.
ast.target: 在飞行时，黑曜掠食者的难度获得+3加值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Obsidian Predator is resistant to physical damage.
ast.target: 黑曜掠食者对物理伤害具有抗性。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make an attack against all targets within Close range. Targets the Obsidian Predator succeeds against take 4d6+4 physical damage and are knocked back to Far range and Vulnerable until their next roll with Hope.
ast.target: 对近距内所有目标进行攻击。被黑曜掠食者攻击成功的目标受到4d6+4点物理伤害，被击退至远距，并在其下一次以希望掷骰前处于易受伤害状态。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the Obsidian Predator is flying, mark a Stress to choose a point within Far range. Move to that point and make an attack against all targets within Very Close range. Targets the Obsidian Predator succeeds against take 2d10+6 physical damage and must mark a Stress and lose a Hope.
ast.target: 若黑曜掠食者正在飞行，标记1点压力以选择远距内一点。移动至该点并对极近距内所有目标发动攻击。被黑曜掠食者攻击成功的目标受到2d10+6点物理伤害，并必须标记1点压力且失去1点希望。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: instead of spending a Fear to spotlight the Ashen Tyrant.
ast.target: 而非花费1点恐惧来聚焦灰烬暴君。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While flying, the Ashen Tyrant gains a +1 bonus to their Difficulty.
ast.target: 在飞行时，灰烬暴君的难度获得+1加值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a PC rolls a failure while within Close range of the Ashen Tyrant, they lose a Hope and you gain a Fear. If the PC can’t lose a Hope, they must mark a HP.
ast.target: 当一名PC在灰烬暴君近距范围内掷出失败时，他们失去1点希望，你获得1点恐惧。若该PC无法失去希望，他们必须标记1点生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make an attack against all targets within Close range. Targets the Ashen Tyrant succeeds against take 2d20+2 physical damage, are knocked back to Close range of where they were, and must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 对近距内所有目标进行攻击。被灰烬暴君攻击成功的目标受到2d20+2点物理伤害，被击退至其原位置的近距，并必须标记1点压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to smash the ground and kick up ash within Far range. While within the ash cloud, a target has disadvantage on action rolls. The ash cloud clears the next time an adversary is spotlighted.
ast.target: 猛击地面，在远距范围内扬起灰烬。身处灰烬云中的目标进行行动掷骰时处于劣势。下次一名对手被聚焦时，灰烬云会消散。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Countdown (1d12). Spend a Fear to activate. It ticks down when a PC rolls with Fear. When it triggers, the Ashen Tyrant thrashes about, causing environmental damage (such as an earthquake, avalanche, or collapsing walls). All targets within Far range must make a Strength Reaction Roll. Targets who fail take 2d10+10 physical damage and are Restrained by the rubble until they break free with a successful Strength Roll. Targets who succeed take half damage. If the Ashen Tyrant is defeated while this countdown is active, trigger the countdown immediately as the destruction caused by their death throes.
ast.target: 倒计时（1d12）。花费1点恐惧以激活。当PC以恐惧掷骰时，倒计时递减。触发时，灰烬暴君疯狂翻滚，造成环境伤害（如地震、雪崩或墙体坍塌）。远距内所有目标必须进行力量反应掷骰。失败者受到2d10+10点物理伤害，并被瓦砾束缚，直到成功进行一次力量掷骰挣脱。成功者受到一半伤害。若倒计时生效期间灰烬暴君被击败，则因其临死前的破坏立即触发该倒计时。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A towering, muscular zombie with magically infused strength and skill.
ast.target: 一只高大健壮的僵尸，力量与技巧皆由魔法强化。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Zombie makes a successful attack, all PCs within Far range lose a Hope and you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当僵尸攻击成功时，远距内所有PC失去1点希望，你获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: PCs can’t spend Hope to use features against the Zombie.
ast.target: PC无法花费希望来对僵尸使用能力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make a standard attack against all targets within Very Close range. Targets the Zombie succeeds against are Vulnerable until their next rest.
ast.target: 对极近距内所有目标进行一次标准攻击。被僵尸攻击成功的目标在下次休息前处于易受伤害状态。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When another adversary deals damage to a target within Very Close range of the Zombie, you can spend a Fear to add the Zombie’s standard attack damage to the damage roll.
ast.target: 当另一名对手对处于僵尸极近距内的目标造成伤害时，你可以花费1点恐惧，将僵尸的标准攻击伤害加到该次伤害掷骰中。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A large pack of undead, still powerful despite their rotting flesh.
ast.target: 一大群亡灵，尽管肉体腐烂却依旧强大。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Legion has marked half or more of their HP, their standard attack deals 2d6+5 physical damage instead.
ast.target: 当亡者军团已标记的生命值达到其一半或更多时，其标准攻击改为造成2d6+5点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Legion has resistance to physical damage.
ast.target: 亡者军团对物理伤害具有抗性。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Legion takes Minor damage from an attack within Melee range, you can mark a Stress to make a standard attack with advantage against the attacker.
ast.target: 当亡者军团在近战范围内受到轻微伤害时，你可以标记1点压力，对攻击者进行一次带优势的标准攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A hideous, twisted giant born out of a rock, wearing purloined armor and a belt of severed heads.
ast.target: 一个丑陋扭曲的巨人，自岩石中诞生，身披掠夺来的铠甲，腰间系着一串被斩下的头颅。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When combat begins, active a Countdown equal to the number of PCs. Whenever the Troll takes damage, tick down the countdown and reduce the HP the Troll marks by 1. When it triggers, the Troll evolves into an Enraged Mountain Troll (see “Enraged Mountain Troll - Evolution”).
ast.target: 战斗开始时，启用一个与PC数量相等的倒计时。每当巨魔受到伤害时，倒计时递减，并将巨魔标记的生命值减少1点。倒计时触发时，巨魔进化为暴怒山岭巨魔（见“暴怒山岭巨魔 - 进化”）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Troll swings their skull fl ail in a wide arc. Mark a Stress to make an attack against all targets in front of the Troll within Very Close range. On a success, the Troll deals 2d10+3 instead of its normal damage. The Troll cannot use this action while evolved. Enraged Mountain Troll - Evolution: The Troll gains a +1 bonus to their Difficulty and their standard attack changes to the following: Claw Swipe: Very Close | 1d8+1 phy
ast.target: 巨魔挥舞其骷髅连枷划出宽广弧线。标记1点压力，对巨魔前方极近距内所有目标发动攻击。成功时，巨魔造成2d10+3点伤害，代替其正常伤害。巨魔在进化状态下无法使用此行动。暴怒山岭巨魔 - 进化：巨魔的难度获得+1加值，其标准攻击变为：利爪横扫：极近 | 1d8+1 phy

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to move the Troll up to Close range and immediately make two standard attacks against a single target within Melee range. If both attacks hit, combine the damage and the target also loses a Hope.
ast.target: 将巨魔移动至最多近距，并立刻对近战范围内的单一目标进行两次标准攻击。若两次攻击都命中，合并伤害，且目标额外失去1点希望。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: These cat-sized balls of hair, limbs, and teeth travel in a “mawb” of about a dozen.
ast.target: 这些猫大小的毛发、四肢和牙齿组成的球，会以大约一打的“mawb”成群移动。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Rabble Mawb has marked half or more of their HP, their standard attack deals 1d4 physical damage instead.
ast.target: 当Rabble Mawb标记了其HP的一半或更多时，其标准攻击改为造成1d4点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a Rabble Mawb is defeated, you can spend a Fear to bring this Rabble Mawb back to life. This new Rabble Mawb gains a +X bonus to all rolls, where X is the number of times this feature has been used by this adversary.
ast.target: 当一个Rabble Mawb被击败时，你可以花费1点Fear使其复活。这个新的Rabble Mawb在所有检定上获得+X加值，X为该对手使用此特性的次数。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A pale, gaunt cult leader holding a seven-foot-tall rod with a candle made from a hanged man’s hand atop it.
ast.target: 一个苍白憔悴的邪教领袖，手持一根七英尺高的杖，杖顶是一支用被绞死之人的手制成的蜡烛。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make a standard attack against up to three targets within range. For each target who marks a HP, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 对射程内最多三个目标进行一次标准攻击。每有一个目标标记1点HP，你获得1点Fear。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Doppelhünd makes a standard attack, you can mark a Stress to make an additional standard attack. If both attacks target the same creature, combine the damage.
ast.target: 当Doppelhünd进行一次标准攻击时，你可以标记1点Stress以进行一次额外的标准攻击。如果两次攻击针对同一生物，合并伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A knight clad in dragonplate armor and a helmet in the shape of a dragon’s head.
ast.target: 一名披着龙鳞板甲、头盔形如龙首的骑士。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Knight gains a +2 bonus to attack rolls when attacking a target from above.
ast.target: 骑士从上方攻击目标时，攻击检定获得+2加值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Knight’s attack roll counts as a critical success if the result on the d20 is a 19 or a 20.
ast.target: 若d20结果为19或20，骑士的攻击检定视为重击成功。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A fl eshy, fl oating ball of teeth with ten jointed antennae rising from its crown, each bearing a diff erent-colored eye.
ast.target: 一个肉质漂浮的牙齿球体，顶部伸出十根有节触须，每根都长着一只不同颜色的眼睛。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A Gobstalker’s breath is so rancid it creates an invisible miasma that negates magical eff ects. Any attack that deals magic damage or creates a magical eff ect in front of the Gobstalker within Close range automatically fails. This feature does not aff ect the Gobstalker’s own features.
ast.target: Gobstalker的吐息恶臭至极，会形成无形瘴气以消除魔法效果。在Gobstalker前方的近距离范围内，任何造成魔法伤害或产生魔法效果的攻击都会自动失败。此特性不影响Gobstalker自身的特性。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to attack a target within Far range. On a hit, spend a Fear to choose an eff ect or roll a d10 for a random eff ect. The Gobstalker uses the corresponding magical beam: 1. Beguile. The target is Beguiled and sees the Gobstalker as a friend. A Beguiled creature cannot attack the Gobstalker. Additionally, a Beguiled PC must mark a Stress or make a standard attack against their nearest ally whenever someone rolls with Fear. This eff ect lasts until the targets succeeds on a Presence or Knowledge Roll (16). 2. Corrode. The target takes 2d8 magical damage and marks an Armor Slot without receiving its benefi ts (they can still use armor to reduce the damage). If all the target’s Armor Slots are already marked, double the damage. 3. Doom. The target immediately marks all cleared HP, but can reduce the number of HP marked this way by spending any number of Hope. For each Hope spent in this way, reduce the number of HP marked by 1. 4. Hypnosis. The target falls into a deep, sleeplike trance and can’t take any actions except for trying to wake up. The target wakes up when they are hit by an attack, mark 1 or more HP, or succeed on an Instinct Roll (16) to wake up. 5. Paralyze. The target freezes in place, becoming Vulnerable and Restrained until they mark 2 Stress. 6. Petrify. Place a Petrifi cation Countdown (6) on the target. It ticks down when a PC rolls with Fear. When it triggers, the target turns to stone until the Gobstalker is defeated or they take a long rest. While stone, the target is immune to all damage and aware of their surroundings, but cannot take actions. 7. Push. The target is thrown up to Far range and takes 3d6 physical damage from whatever they hit. 8. Sear. The target takes 2d8 direct magical damage. 9. Slow. The target is Vulnerable and must mark a Stress to move. The target can spend 2 Hope at any time to end this eff ect. 1 0. Terrify. The target can’t act except to fl ee the battle or try to shake off their fear with a successful Insight Roll (16). Additionally, whenever you spend Fear, the target must mark a Stress. This eff ect lasts until the Gobstalker is defeated or the target takes a rest.
ast.target: 对远距离内的一个目标发动攻击。命中时，花费1点Fear选择一种效果，或投掷d10获得随机效果。Gobstalker施放对应的魔法射线：1. 诱惑（Beguile）。目标被诱惑，将Gobstalker视为朋友。被诱惑的生物无法攻击Gobstalker。此外，每当有人以Fear进行检定时，被诱惑的PC必须标记1点Stress，或对其最近的盟友进行一次标准攻击。此效果持续到目标成功通过一次Presence或Knowledge检定（16）。2. 腐蚀（Corrode）。目标承受2d8点魔法伤害，并标记一个Armor Slot但不获得其益处（仍可用护甲来减少伤害）。若目标所有Armor Slot已标记，伤害加倍。3. 厄运（Doom）。目标立即标记所有已清除的HP，但可花费任意数量的Hope来减少以此方式标记的HP数量。每花费1点Hope，减少1点被标记的HP。4. 催眠（Hypnosis）。目标陷入深度类睡眠恍惚，除尝试醒来外无法采取行动。目标在被攻击命中、标记1点或更多HP，或成功通过一次Instinct检定（16）时醒来。5. 麻痹（Paralyze）。目标原地僵住，变为Vulnerable与Restrained，直到其标记2点Stress。6. 石化（Petrify）。在目标身上放置一个Petrifi cation Countdown（6）。当PC以Fear检定时其倒计时减少。触发时，目标变为石头，直到Gobstalker被击败或其进行一次长休。石化期间，目标免疫所有伤害且知晓周围环境，但无法行动。7. 推击（Push）。目标被抛掷至最多远距离，并因撞击物体而承受3d6点物理伤害。8. 灼烧（Sear）。目标承受2d8点直接魔法伤害。9. 迟缓（Slow）。目标变为Vulnerable且移动必须标记1点Stress。目标可在任何时候花费2点Hope结束此效果。1 0. 恐惧（Terrify）。目标除逃离战斗或通过成功的Insight检定（16）驱散恐惧外无法行动。此外，每当你花费Fear，目标必须标记1点Stress。此效果持续到Gobstalker被击败或目标进行一次休息。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A magically animated statue in the form of a terrifying beast or devil.
ast.target: 一尊被魔法驱动的雕像，形态为可怖的野兽或恶魔。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Gargoyle is resistant to physical damage.
ast.target: Gargoyle对物理伤害具有抗性。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Choose a point within Far range. The Gargoyle moves to that point in a straight line and makes an attack against one target along its path.
ast.target: 选择远距离范围内的一点。Gargoyle以直线移动到该点，并对路径上的一个目标发动攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A giant, fi re-breathing monster with a lion’s head, a goat’s body, and a serpent’s tail.
ast.target: 一只巨大的喷火怪物，狮子的头、山羊的身躯、蛇的尾巴。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Chimera makes a successful attack, the target must mark 2 Armor Slots instead of 1 to reduce the damage by one threshold.
ast.target: 当Chimera攻击成功时，目标必须标记2个Armor Slot而非1个，才能将伤害降低一个阈值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to target up to three PCs in front of the Chimera within Close range. All targets must make an Agility Reaction Roll (20). Targets who fail take 3d12 magic damage. Targets who succeed must to either mark an Armor Slot or mark a Stress.
ast.target: 以Chimera前方近距离范围内最多三名PC为目标。所有目标必须进行一次Agility Reaction Roll（20）。失败者受到3d12点魔法伤害。成功者必须标记一个Armor Slot或标记1点Stress。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: After the Chimera makes a standard attack, you can mark a Stress to make an additional standard attack. If both attacks target the same creature, combine the damage.
ast.target: 在Chimera进行一次标准攻击后，你可以标记1点Stress以进行一次额外的标准攻击。如果两次攻击针对同一生物，合并伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The echoes of broken promises and dreams unfulfi lled, these wraiths appear as fl oating, translucent shrouds of tattered black velvet in a vaguely humanoid shape.
ast.target: 这些怨灵是破碎誓言与未竟梦境的回响，显现为飘浮的半透明破碎黑丝绒裹布，呈模糊的人形。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Wraith is immune to physical damage and weak against magic damage. Additionally, the Wraith can move through solid objects.
ast.target: Wraith免疫物理伤害，但弱于魔法伤害。此外，Wraith可穿过实体物体。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Wraith makes a successful attack, all PCs within Close range must mark a Stress and you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当Wraith攻击成功时，近距离范围内所有PC必须标记1点Stress，你获得1点Fear。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Shadow King gains a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls while in shadow or darkness and a −1 penalty to attack and damage rolls while in bright light.
ast.target: Shadow King在阴影或黑暗中进行攻击与伤害检定时获得+1加值，而在强光下则受到−1减值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Shadow King has advantage on attacks against PCs with magical weapons or armor equipped.
ast.target: Shadow King对装备魔法武器或护甲的PC进行攻击时具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend 2 Fear to have the Shadow King’s mount unleash a spine-chilling screech that echoes over the battlefi eld. All PCs within Far range must make a Presence Reaction Roll (18). Targets who succeed must mark a Stress. Targets who fail must mark a Stress and lose a Hope. If the PC can’t lose a Hope, you gain 2 Fear.
ast.target: 花费2点Fear，让Shadow King的坐骑发出穿透心魄的尖啸，回荡在战场上。远距离范围内所有PC必须进行一次Presence Reaction Roll（18）。成功者必须标记1点Stress。失败者必须标记1点Stress并失去1点Hope。若该PC无法失去Hope，你获得2点Fear。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Three times per scene, you can spend a Fear to have an adversary within Far range of the Shadow King reroll a missed attack with advantage.
ast.target: 每个场景最多三次，你可以花费一点恐惧，使暗影之王远距范围内的一名敌手重掷一次未命中的攻击并获得优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A huge mer-creature who lures unwary prey into eating range with their dangling, shapeshifting head stalk.
ast.target: 一种巨大的人鱼生物，会用可摆动、可变形的头部触须引诱毫无防备的猎物进入可被吞食的范围。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to play an alluring overture to a PC within Close range. The PC must succeed on a Presence Reaction Roll (18) or move into Melee range with the Beguiler. If the Beguiler’s head stalk is in a form the PC would fi nd trustworthy, they have disadvantage on the reaction roll.
ast.target: 对近距范围内的一名PC奏出诱人的序曲。该PC必须通过一次气场反应检定（18），否则将移动到与魅惑者的近战范围内。如果魅惑者的头部触须呈现出该PC会信任的形态，则该反应检定具有劣势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A heavenly host of winged humanoids whose song calls forth tears of religious awe.
ast.target: 一支长翼类人生物的天界合唱团，其歌声引人因宗教般的敬畏而落泪。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Choir has marked half or more of their HP, their standard attack deals 2d8+3 magic damage instead.
ast.target: 当合唱团已标记其生命值的一半或以上时，他们的标准攻击改为造成2d8+3点魔法伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Countdown (Loop 3). The Choir’s divine song builds on itself with each refrain. Activate the countdown when the Choir is fi rst spotlighted. It ticks down on every action roll. When it triggers, place a token on this stat block. The Choir gains a bonus to their Difficulty and standard attack damage equal to the number of tokens on this stat block.
ast.target: 倒计时（循环3）。合唱团的神圣歌声会在每次重复中层层叠加。合唱团首次被聚光时启动倒计时。每次行动检定都会推进倒计时。当其触发时，在此数据块上放置一个标记。合唱团的难度与标准攻击伤害获得等同于此数据块上标记数量的加值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A giant, vengeful barn owl with a 15-foot wingspan and a human face.
ast.target: 一只巨大的复仇仓鸮，翼展15英尺，长着人脸。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a PC within Close range makes an action roll, their Fear Die gains a bonus equal to the amount of Fear you currently have.
ast.target: 当近距范围内的一名PC进行行动检定时，其恐惧骰获得等同于你当前恐惧值的加值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Owl Witch is resistant to magic damage.
ast.target: 猫头鹰女巫对魔法伤害具有抗性。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Owl Witch can perfectly mimic the voice of a loved one or trusted fi gure. Spend a Fear to have the Owl Witch call out to a creature within earshot. The target must succeed on an Instinct Reaction Roll or move up to Far range toward the Owl Witch.
ast.target: 猫头鹰女巫可以完美模仿所爱之人或可信人物的声音。花费一点恐惧，使猫头鹰女巫呼唤一名在听觉范围内的生物。目标必须通过一次直觉反应检定，否则将向猫头鹰女巫移动至最远为远距范围。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to have the Owl Witch Affl ict a target within Far range with waking nightmares. Until a PC uses a downtime move to comfort the Affl icted creature and clear the condition, the Affl icted creature can’t clear Stress or HP by any means.
ast.target: 使猫头鹰女巫令远距范围内的一个目标陷入清醒噩梦。直到一名PC使用休整行动安抚该受折磨生物并移除此状态前，该受折磨生物无法以任何方式清除压力或生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to have Xero bring their foot down hard, creating a localized earthquake. All creatures within Melee range take 4d12 physical damage and are Restrained until they succeed on a Finesse Roll to slide out from underfoot. All creatures outside of Melee range and within Close range must succeed on an Instinct Reaction Roll or be knocked back up to Far range. If a target is knocked back, they must mark an Armor Slot or take 4d12 physical damage as they land.
ast.target: 使Xero重重踏下，制造局部地震。近战范围内所有生物受到4d12点物理伤害并被束缚，直到其通过一次灵巧检定从脚下滑出。所有处于近战范围外且在近距范围内的生物必须通过一次直觉反应检定，否则被击退最远至远距范围。若目标被击退，落地时必须标记一个护甲槽位，否则受到4d12点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to move Xero up to Close range. All creatures Xero moves through must make a Strength Reaction Roll. Targets who fail must mark 2 Armor Slots or take Severe Damage.
ast.target: 使Xero移动最远至近距范围。Xero移动路径上的所有生物必须进行一次力量反应检定。失败的目标必须标记2个护甲槽位，否则受到严重伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to have Xero charge up a nuclear beam and place a token on this stat block. The next time Xero takes the spotlight, you can spend this token and unleash the beam. Draw a line with a Close range width from Xero to the edge of the battlefi eld. All PCs within this path must make an Agility Reaction Roll. Targets who faill take 4d12+12 direct magic damage. Targets who succeed take half damage. Xero can’t use this action again until they take Severe damage.
ast.target: 使Xero蓄力核能光束，并在此数据块上放置一个标记。下一次Xero被聚光时，你可以花费该标记并释放光束。从Xero到战场边缘画出一条宽度为近距范围的直线。路径内所有PC必须进行一次敏捷反应检定。失败的目标受到4d12+12点直接魔法伤害。成功的目标受到一半伤害。在Xero受到严重伤害之前，不能再次使用该行动。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Up to three times per scene, spend any number of Fear to clear an equal number of HP.
ast.target: 每个场景最多三次，花费任意数量的恐惧以清除等量的生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A robe-wearing, squid-headed humanoid from the Outer Realms.
ast.target: 来自外域的披袍乌贼头类人生物。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: and choose up to three targets within Close range to make a Knowledge or Instinct Reaction Roll (20). Targets who succeed take 2d10+5 direct magical damage. Targets who fail take 4d10+10 direct magical damage and are Vulnerable until spotlighted.
ast.target: 并选择近距范围内最多三个目标进行知识或直觉反应检定（20）。成功的目标受到2d10+5点直接魔法伤害。失败的目标受到4d10+10点直接魔法伤害，并在被聚光之前处于易伤状态。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to choose a Vulnerable target within Melee range. The Priest grabs the target and tries to insert their face tentacles into the target’s ears, nose, and mouth. The target must succeed on a Strength Reaction Roll or mark 1d6 Stress. The Priest clears a number of Stress equal to the number of Stress the target marked.
ast.target: 选择近战范围内一名易伤目标。祭司抓住目标，试图将其面部触须插入目标的耳朵、鼻子和嘴巴。目标必须通过一次力量反应检定，否则标记1d6点压力。祭司清除的压力数量等同于目标标记的压力数量。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Priest succeeds on a standard attack, you can mark a Stress to Restrain the target until they spend a Hope to clear this condition.
ast.target: 当祭司以标准攻击命中时，你可以标记1点压力以束缚目标，直到其花费1点希望来清除此状态。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An ancient warrior, buried with the gate to protect entry; their skeletal mass is armored and their curved blade is deadly.
ast.target: 一名古老战士，与大门一同下葬以守护入口；其骸骨覆盖护甲，弯刃致命。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Guardian has resistance to physical damage. When the Guardian takes physical damage from a PC within Melee range, the PC is pushed anywhere up to Very Close range of where it stood.
ast.target: 守护者对物理伤害具有抗性。当守护者受到近战范围内PC造成的物理伤害时，该PC会被推开到距其原站位最远为极近距离的任意位置。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make an attack against every PC within Very Close range in front of the Guardian.
ast.target: 对守护者前方极近距离内的每名PC进行一次攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Guardian takes physical damage from an attack, you can spend a Fear to call a Skeleton Dredge from a near
ast.target: 当守护者受到攻击造成的物理伤害时，你可以花费一点恐惧，从附近召来一名骸骨掘尸者

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Velk Dravenmoor, wounded and corrupted by dark powers, swells into a feral terror, frenzied and murderous.
ast.target: 维尔克·德拉文莫尔受伤且被黑暗力量腐化，膨胀成狂野的恐怖之物，疯狂而嗜杀。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Velk can be spotlighted up to two times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight him.
ast.target: 每个GM回合，维尔克最多可被聚光两次。照常花费恐惧来聚光他。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to allow Velk to leap anywhere within Far range and make an attack. On a success, he deals an additional 1d12 damage.
ast.target: 使Velk可以跃至远距范围内任意位置并发动攻击。成功时，他额外造成1d12伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make a standard attack against all targets within Very Close range.
ast.target: 对极近距离内的所有目标进行一次标准攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make an attack against a target within Melee range. On a success, deal 1d8+3 physical damage and the target must make a Strength Reaction Roll (13) or be moved anywhere within Close range.
ast.target: 对近战距离内的目标进行攻击。成功时，造成1d8+3物理伤害，且目标必须进行一次力量反应检定（13），否则被移动到近距范围内的任意位置。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When Velk makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear. ERYN (LIMB WREATH) Tier 1 Leader (Umbra-Touched) Eryn has become something of nightmares, a host for numerous tentacle limbs that grasp and spear, tearing apart all she once loved. Motives & Tactics: Multiply tentacles, devour Difficulty: 13 | Thresholds: 6/13 | HP: 8 | Stress: 5 ATK: +3 | Limb Slam: Close | 2d6+2 phy Experience: Slimy +2 FEATURES
ast.target: 当Velk对一名PC进行成功攻击时，你获得一枚Fear。ERYN（LIMB WREATH）1级领袖（受暗影触染）Eryn已化作梦魇之物，成为无数触手肢体的宿主，抓握并刺穿，撕裂她曾经所爱的一切。动机与战术：增殖触手、吞噬 难度：13 | 阈值：6/13 | HP：8 | Stress：5 ATK：+3 | 肢体猛击：Close | 2d6+2 物理 经验：Slimy +2 特性

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Targets who mark HP from the Limb Wreath's attacks must also mark a Stress.
ast.target: 因Limb Wreath的攻击而标记HP的目标也必须标记一格Stress。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make an attack roll against up to 3 targets within Close range. Any you succeed against take 1d8+2 physical damage and must succeed on a Strength Reaction Roll (13) or be pulled in Melee range of the Limb Wreath.
ast.target: 对近距范围内至多3个目标进行攻击检定。任何被你命中的目标受到1d8+2物理伤害，并必须通过一次力量反应检定（13），否则被拉入Limb Wreath的近战范围。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make an attack against a target within Melee range. On a success, the target takes 2d8 physical damage, and the Limb Wreath clears 2 HP.
ast.target: 对近战距离内的目标进行攻击。成功时，目标受到2d8物理伤害，且Limb Wreath清除2点HP。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Limb Wreath marks 2 or more HP from an attack, you can mark a Stress to create a Living Tentacle within Very Close range. The Tentacle is immediately spotlighted.
ast.target: 当Limb Wreath因一次攻击标记2点或更多HP时，你可以标记一格Stress，在极近距离内创造一条活触手。该触手立即进入聚光。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A part of the Limb Wreath is severed, twitching and moving on its own.
ast.target: Limb Wreath的一部分被切断，仍在抽动并自行移动。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Targets who mark HP from the Tentacle's attacks must also mark a Stress.
ast.target: 因触手的攻击而标记HP的目标也必须标记一格Stress。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Tentacle is defeated when they take any damage. For every 5 damage a PC deals to a Tentacle, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
ast.target: 触手受到任何伤害即被击败。PC对触手每造成5点伤害，额外击败一个在该攻击可命中范围内的Minion。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mutated, feral predators covered in patchy fur and scales, their claws deadly and their barbed tails venomous.
ast.target: 变异的野性掠食者，身披斑驳的毛皮与鳞片，利爪致命，倒刺尾巴有毒。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a Pain Beast attacks a target within Very Close range of another Pain Beast, the attack has advantage.
ast.target: 当Pain Beast攻击位于另一只Pain Beast极近距离内的目标时，该攻击具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to move anywhere within Far range and make an attack against a target within Very Close range. On a success, the target takes 2d8+4 physical damage and marks a Stress.
ast.target: 移动到远距范围内任意位置，并对极近距离内的目标发动攻击。成功时，目标受到2d8+4物理伤害并标记一格Stress。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make an attack roll against a target within Close range. On a success, the target takes 2d8 physical damage and, if they mark any number of HP, becomes Infected until they heal any number of HP. While Infected, they have disadvantage on action rolls.
ast.target: 对近距范围内的目标进行攻击检定。成功时，目标受到2d8物理伤害，并且若其标记了任意数量的HP，则直到其恢复任意数量的HP之前处于Infected状态。处于Infected时，其行动检定具有劣势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If an attacker is within Very Close range when the Pain Beast marks 2 or more HP, spend a Fear to deal 1d8+3 physical damage to the attacker.
ast.target: 当Pain Beast标记2点或更多HP时，若攻击者在极近距离内，消耗一枚Fear对攻击者造成1d8+3物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A massive nexus of forest will and dark magic, this tower of rotting flesh and fungal might seeks to increase its mass.
ast.target: 由森林意志与黑暗魔法交织成的巨大枢纽，这座腐肉与真菌之力构成的高塔渴望增长自身的体量。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Targets who fail an action or roll with Fear within Close range of the Rotlord must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 在Rotlord近距范围内，因Fear而行动或检定失败的目标必须标记一格Stress。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to conjure 2 Caustic Fungus anywhere within Close range. These Fungus are immediately spotlighted.
ast.target: 在近距范围内任意位置召唤2个Caustic Fungus。它们立即进入聚光。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a creature within Close range cannot mark a Stress and instead must mark HP, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当近距范围内的生物无法标记Stress而必须标记HP时，你获得一枚Fear。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The underbrush of the Screaming Forest has a hive mind of its own.
ast.target: 尖啸森林的灌木丛拥有自己的群体心智。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Caustic Fungus is defeated when they take any damage. For every 4 damage a PC deals to a Caustic Fungus, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
ast.target: Caustic Fungus受到任何伤害即被击败。PC对Caustic Fungus每造成4点伤害，额外击败一个在该攻击可命中范围内的Minion。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Targets who are successfully hit by the Fungus' attacks must also mark an Armor Slot without receiving its benefits.
ast.target: 被真菌攻击成功命中的目标还必须标记一个护甲槽位，但不获得其收益。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Seekers for Mother, they collect what might please her.
ast.target: 作为母亲的寻觅者，他们收集可能取悦她的事物。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Make an attack against a target within Very Close range. On a success, they take 1d8+3 physical damage and must make a Instinct Reaction Roll (13). On a failure, they become Asleep until they take damage, or until 1d4 hours have passed. While Asleep, a PC cannot be spotlighted.
ast.target: 对极近距离内的目标发动攻击。成功时，其受到1d8+3物理伤害，并必须进行一次直觉反应检定（13）。失败则陷入Asleep，直到其受到伤害或经过1d4小时为止。处于Asleep时，PC无法进入聚光。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make a target within Close range roll an Agility Reaction Roll (13). On a failure, they are Restrained and Vulnerable until they succeed on a Strength or Agility Action Roll (15).
ast.target: 使一名处于近距的目标进行一次敏捷反应检定（13）。失败则其处于束缚与易伤状态，直到其成功通过一次力量或敏捷行动检定（15）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Mother of the Hive, she seeks materials and subjects to conduct her strange biological experiments on.
ast.target: 蜂巢之母，她寻求材料与试验对象来进行她那怪异的生物实验。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Before Mother makes an attack, roll a d6. On a result of 4 or higher, the target's Evasion is halved against the attack.
ast.target: 在母亲进行攻击前，掷1d6。结果为4或更高时，目标对此次攻击的闪避减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make an attack against all targets within Close range. On a success, Mother deals 2d6+10 physical damage.
ast.target: 对近距内所有目标进行一次攻击。成功时，母亲造成2d6+10点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When Mother makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当母亲对一名PC成功攻击时，你获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A towering being of sorrow and service, forever doomed to wander at Terrorgut's behest.
ast.target: 一位高大的悲伤与服侍之存在，永远被迫听命于恐惧巨腹而漂泊。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When you spotlight the Thrall and they don't have a token on their stat block, they can't act yet. Place a token on their stat block and describe what they're preparing to do. When you spotlight the Thrall and they have a token on their stat block, clear the token and they can act.
ast.target: 当你聚焦仆从且其数据栏上没有标记时，他们尚不能行动。在其数据栏上放置一个标记并描述他们准备做什么。当你聚焦仆从且其数据栏上有标记时，移除该标记，他们可以行动。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make an attack against a target within Very Close range. On a success, the target takes 2d12+7 physical damage, is Restrained, and has disadvantage on attack rolls until they succeed on a Strength or Agility Action Roll (16).
ast.target: 对极近距内一名目标进行攻击。成功时，目标受到2d12+7点物理伤害，被束缚，并在其成功通过一次力量或敏捷行动检定（16）前，攻击掷骰处于劣势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make an attack against a target within Very Close range. On a success, the target and any PCs in the cage take 2d12+15 physical damage.
ast.target: 对极近距内一名目标进行攻击。成功时，目标及笼中的所有PC受到2d12+15点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Thrall makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当仆从对一名PC成功攻击时，你获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: when the Thrall marks 2 or more HP from a PC attack within Very Close range. Then, immediately make an attack against the attacker. On a success, they take 2d6+7 physical damage and are pushed to Far range.
ast.target: 当仆从在极近距受到一名PC攻击并标记2点或更多HP时，立即对攻击者进行一次攻击。成功时，其受到2d6+7点物理伤害并被推至远距。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Make an attack against a target within Very Close range. On a success, they take 2d6+8 physical damage and must make a Instinct Reaction Roll (15). On a failure, they become Asleep until they take damage, or until 1d4 hours have passed. While Asleep, a PC cannot be spotlighted.
ast.target: 对极近距内一名目标进行攻击。成功时，其受到2d6+8点物理伤害并必须进行一次直觉反应检定（15）。失败则其进入睡眠状态，直到受到伤害或经过1d4小时。处于睡眠时，PC无法被聚焦。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When Terrorgut makes a successful attack, all PCs within Far range lose a Hope and you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当恐惧巨腹成功攻击时，远距内所有PC失去1点希望，你获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When Terrorgut takes physical damage, reduce it by 3.
ast.target: 当恐惧巨腹受到物理伤害时，将其减少3点。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to create a Shambling Zombie within Very Close range. The Shambling Zombie is immediately spotlighted.
ast.target: 在极近距内创造一名蹒跚僵尸。该蹒跚僵尸立即被聚焦。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When you mark 2 or more HP from a PC attack within Close range, you can mark a Stress and roll an attack against the attacker. On a success, they take 2d10+10 physical damage, mark a Stress, and are pulled into Melee range.
ast.target: 当你在近距内受到一名PC攻击并标记2点或更多HP时，你可以标记1点压力并对攻击者进行一次攻击。成功时，其受到2d10+10点物理伤害，标记1点压力，并被拉入近战范围。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A hardened cutthroat and thief who hunts for the Queens.
ast.target: 为诸位女王狩猎的老练割喉者与盗贼。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Ambusher succeeds on a standard attack that has advantage, they deal 2d10+8 physical damage instead of their standard damage.
ast.target: 当伏击者以优势成功进行一次标准攻击时，其造成2d10+8点物理伤害，代替其标准伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Become Hidden until after the Ambusher's next attack. Attacks made while Hidden from this feature have advantage.
ast.target: 进入潜行状态，直到伏击者下一次攻击后结束。因该能力而处于潜行时进行的攻击具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A crew of cackling killers relishing in chaos and plunder.
ast.target: 一群狂笑的杀手，沉醉于混乱与掠夺。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Band has marked half or more of their HP, their standard attack deals 2d4+2 physical damage instead.
ast.target: 当匪帮已标记其一半或更多HP时，其标准攻击改为造成2d4+2点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a target of the Band's attack marks 2 or more HP, you can mark a Stress to make all targets within Very Close range lose a Hope. If a target is not able to lose a Hope, they must instead mark 2 Stress.
ast.target: 当匪帮攻击的目标标记2点或更多HP时，你可以标记1点压力，使极近距内所有目标失去1点希望。若某目标无法失去希望，则改为标记2点压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Ranged raiders of the Damask Queens.
ast.target: 锦绣女王的远程掠袭者。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Squad has marked half or more of their HP, their standard attack deals 1d6+3 physical damage instead.
ast.target: 当小队已标记其一半或更多HP时，其标准攻击改为造成1d6+3点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to target a point within Far range. Make an attack with advantage against all targets within Close range of that point. Any you succeed against take 1d10+4 physical damage.
ast.target: 以远距内的一点为目标。对该点近距内所有目标以优势进行一次攻击。对成功命中的目标造成1d10+4点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to target a point within Far range. Until the next roll with Fear, a creature who moves within Close range of that point must make an Agility Reaction Roll (14). On a failure, they take 2d6+3 physical damage. On a success, they take half.
ast.target: 以远距离范围内一点为目标。直到下一次带有Fear的掷骰，进入该点近距离范围内的生物必须进行一次敏捷反应掷骰（14）。失败时，受到2d6+3点物理伤害。成功时，受到一半伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The once beloved protector of the weald now stews in corruption, half-mad and seeking blood for their blade as penance for the land's decay.
ast.target: 曾被爱戴的林地守护者如今在腐化中煎熬，半疯癫，为其刀刃索血以赎土地的衰败。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A flame of ancient magic still burns within the Fane Warden. Whenever a PC would cause the Fane Warden to heal HP or Stress, start a Progress Countdown (4), reducing it by 1 each additional time it would be healed one HP or Stress. When this countdown would count below 1, the Warden is restored.
ast.target: 远古魔法的火焰仍在Fane Warden体内燃烧。每当一名PC会使Fane Warden回复HP或Stress，启动一个进度倒计时（4），此后每次再将其治疗1点HP或Stress时倒计时减少1。当该倒计时将降到1以下时，守卫者复原。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make an attack against every target within Very Close range. On a success, they take 2d10+8 physical damage and must make a Strength Reaction Roll (15). On a failure, they are pushed away to Far range of their location.
ast.target: 对极近距离范围内的每个目标进行一次攻击。成功时，受到2d10+8点物理伤害，并必须进行一次力量反应掷骰（15）。失败时，他们被推离到其所在位置的远距离范围。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to Root the Fane Warden in place. Fane Warden is Restrained while Rooted, and can end this effect instead of moving while they are spotlighted. While Rooted, Fane Warden has resistance to physical damage.
ast.target: 使Fane Warden原地生根。被生根时Fane Warden处于束缚状态，并且在其被聚焦时可选择结束该效果而非移动。生根期间，Fane Warden对物理伤害具有抗性。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Fane Warden marks 2 or more HP from an attack within Very Close range, mark a Stress to make a standard attack against the attacker. On a success, the Fane Warden deals 2d10+8 physical damage and the target is pushed to Far range.
ast.target: 当Fane Warden因极近距离内的攻击标记2点或更多HP时，标记1点Stress，对攻击者进行一次标准攻击。成功时，Fane Warden造成2d10+8点物理伤害，并将目标推至远距离范围。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Her holy mission slandered and her compassion punished for audacity, a darker power became seeded within her buried and bound soul. The Grand Ordinants created their own dark prophesy.
ast.target: 她的神圣使命遭到诽谤，她的怜悯因胆敢而受罚，更黑暗的力量在她被埋葬并束缚的灵魂中生根。Grand Ordinants创造了他们自己的黑暗预言。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Evelyar can be spotlighted up to two times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight her.
ast.target: Evelyar每个GM回合最多可被聚焦两次。如常花费Fear来聚焦她。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When Evelyar takes damage, reduce it by the number of Profane Disciples within Close range. When a PC marks their last HP within Close range of Evelyar, she heals a HP and clears a Stress.
ast.target: 当Evelyar受到伤害时，将其减少等于近距离范围内的Profane Disciples数量。当一名PC在Evelyar近距离范围内标记其最后一点HP时，她回复1点HP并清除1点Stress。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make an attack against all targets within Very Close range. On a success, they take 2d8+5 physical damage.
ast.target: 对极近距离范围内所有目标进行一次攻击。成功时，受到2d8+5点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to spotlight 1d4+1 allies. Attacks they make during this spotlight deal half damage.
ast.target: 聚焦1d4+1名盟友。他们在本次聚焦期间的攻击只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to have a PC within Very Close range make an Insight or Presence Reaction Roll. On a failure, they mark a Stress, they become Vulnerable until they roll a success with Hope, and Evelyar heals 2 HP.
ast.target: 使一名处于极近距离范围内的PC进行一次洞察或威仪反应掷骰。失败时，他们标记1点Stress，直到他们用Hope掷出成功为止处于易伤状态，并且Evelyar回复2点HP。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Countdown (Loop 1d8). When Evelyar is in the spotlight for the first time, activate the countdown. When it triggers, a choir of discordant voices covers an area within Far range of Evelyar. When a target marks HP from an attack by Evelyar within the dark song, all PCs within Far range of the target lose a Hope. This song can be ended by dealing Severe damage to Evelyar, after which the countdown restarts.
ast.target: 倒计时（循环1d8）。当Evelyar第一次被聚焦时，激活倒计时。触发时，一支不和谐的合唱覆盖Evelyar远距离范围内的一片区域。当目标在黑暗之歌中因Evelyar的攻击标记HP时，目标远距离范围内的所有PC失去1点Hope。此歌可通过对Evelyar造成严重伤害结束，之后倒计时重新开始。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When Evelyar makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当Evelyar对一名PC进行成功攻击时，你获得1点Fear。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: One of the disciples of Evelyar, betrayed by the clergy and forgotten with their heretical Saint. Their vengeful furvor is fueled by Evelyar's madness.
ast.target: Evelyar的弟子之一，被神职人员背叛，与他们的异端圣徒一同被遗忘。他们复仇的狂热由Evelyar的疯狂所驱动。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Disciple is within Melee range of a creature and at least one other Disciple is within Close range, all attacks against that creature have advantage.
ast.target: 当该弟子位于某生物的近战距离内且至少另一名弟子位于近距离范围内时，对该生物的所有攻击具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When Evelyar takes damage from an attack within Very Close range of the Disciple, mark a Stress to make a standard attack against the attacker.
ast.target: 当Evelyar在该弟子极近距离范围内因攻击受到伤害时，标记1点Stress，对攻击者进行一次标准攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Description: A nimble folk with serrated blades and cunning tactics.
ast.target: 描述：一个行动敏捷、持锯齿刀刃并善用诡计的族类。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A quick and deadly striker who waits for the perfect moment to strike.
ast.target: 一名迅捷致命的打击者，等待最佳时机出手。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A wolf-owl pack hunter with wings and a rotating head.
ast.target: 一种狼鸮般的群猎者，长有翅膀并能旋转头部。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When making a Bite and Claw attack, if another Strixwolf is also in Melee range of the target, deal 2d8+2 physical damage instead.
ast.target: 进行啃咬与利爪攻击时，若另一只Strixwolf也在目标的近战距离内，则改为造成2d8+2点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: This creature ignores the Hidden condition on anyone within Close range.
ast.target: 该生物无视近距离范围内任何人的隐藏状态。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make the Strixwolf take flight, increasing their Difficulty by +2 and making their attacks worth +2 damage until the Strixwolf lands.
ast.target: 使Strixwolf起飞，使其难度+2，且其攻击伤害+2，直到Strixwolf降落为止。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Forest Wraith has resistance to physical damage.
ast.target: Forest Wraith对物理伤害具有抗性。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An amphibious bull-sized hybrid with springing legs and a powerful tongue.
ast.target: 一种两栖的牛大小杂交体，具备弹跳的腿和强力的舌头。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Make an attack against a target within Close range. On a success, deal 1d8+4 physical damage and pull the target into Melee.
ast.target: 对近距离范围内的目标进行一次攻击。成功时，造成 1d8+4 点物理伤害，并将目标拉入近战。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Whenever an attack against this creature misses, the Bullfrog may leap anywhere within Far range.
ast.target: 每当对该生物的攻击未命中时，牛蛙可以跳跃到远距离范围内的任意位置。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A large reptile-fish hybrid with a powerful jaw and predatory instincts.
ast.target: 一种大型爬行动物与鱼类的混合体，拥有强壮的颚和捕食本能。

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 恢复 1 点生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A former druidic grove lying fallow and fully reclaimed by nature.
ast.target: 一片曾经的德鲁伊圣林，现已荒废并被自然完全收复。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An ambush is set to catch an unsuspecting party off-guard.
ast.target: 设下伏击，打对方一个措手不及。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An ambush is set by the PCs to catch unsuspecting adversaries off-guard.
ast.target: 由玩家角色设下伏击，打对手一个措手不及。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A steep, rocky cliff side tall enough to make traversal dangerous.
ast.target: 一处陡峭的岩石峭壁，高到足以使通行变得危险。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A lively tavern that serves as the social hub for its town.
ast.target: 一家热闹的酒馆，是该城镇的社交中心。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A small town on the outskirts of a nation or region, close to a dungeon, tombs, or other adventuring destinations.
ast.target: 一座位于国家或地区边缘的小镇，靠近地城、陵墓或其他冒险目的地。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A swift-moving river without a bridge crossing, deep enough to sweep away most people.
ast.target: 一条湍急的河流，没有桥可过，水深足以冲走大多数人。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An abandoned city populated by the restless spirits of eras past.
ast.target: 一座废弃的城市，居住着往昔时代不安的亡灵。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Stony peaks that pierce the clouds, with a twisting path winding its way up and over through many switchbacks.
ast.target: 石质山峰直刺云霄，一条蜿蜒小径盘旋其上，曲折迂回。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Thick indigo ash fills the air around a towering moss-covered tree that burns eternally with flames a sickly shade of blue.
ast.target: 高大、覆满苔藓的巨树永恒燃烧，火焰呈病态的蓝色，厚重的靛蓝色灰烬弥漫其周围的空气。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An active siege with an attacking force fighting to gain entry to a fortified castle.
ast.target: 一场正在进行的围攻，进攻方正试图攻入一座设防城堡。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A massive combat between two large groups of armed combatants.
ast.target: 两支大型武装群体之间的一场大规模战斗。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An otherworldly space where the laws of reality are unstable and dangerous.
ast.target: 一个异世界空间，现实法则不稳定且危险。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A community-wide celebration featuring way too much drink, food, and fun.
ast.target: 一场全社区的庆典，酒水、食物和娱乐都多得过头。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A harsh and alien landscape that shines with towers of glittering crystal.
ast.target: 一片严酷而陌生的景观，闪耀着晶莹水晶塔的光辉。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A sprawling metropolis at the nexus of creation, where influential fi gures from across the realms gather.
ast.target: 一座位于创世枢纽的庞大都会，各界有影响力的人物在此汇聚。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A shabby but well-defended hideout nestled among the brambles of the Sablewood.
ast.target: 一处破旧但防守严密的藏身处，隐于塞布尔伍德的荆棘丛中。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Fortified and well-kept tunnels leading to underborne communities within the great forest.
ast.target: 通往大森林中地下族群的加固且维护良好的隧道。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A small but friendly village nestled into the heart of the Sablewood.
ast.target: 一座小而友好的村庄，坐落在塞布尔伍德的腹地。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A vast, windswept expanse of rolling grassland and ancient stone monuments.
ast.target: 一片广袤、风吹不息的起伏草原，点缀着古老的石质遗迹。

ast.name: text
ast.source: There has been a battle here. A PC can make an Instinct Roll to identify evidence of that fight. On a success with Hope, learn all three pieces of information below. On a success with Fear, learn two. On a failure, a PC can mark a Stress to learn one and gain advantage on the next action roll to investigate this environment. A PC with an appropriate background or Experience can learn an additional detail and ask a follow-up question about the scene and get a truthful (if not always complete) answer.
ast.target: 这里发生过一场战斗。PC 可以进行一次本能检定来识别这场战斗的证据。若以希望成功，了解下方三条信息。若以恐惧成功，了解两条。若失败，PC 可以标记 1 点压力以了解一条，并在下一次调查该环境的行动检定中获得优势。具有适当背景或经历的 PC 可以额外了解一个细节，并就现场提出一个追问，得到真实（但不一定完整）的答案。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Pick a point within the grove. All targets within Very Close range of that point must succeed on an Agility Reaction Roll or take 1d8+3 physical damage and become Restrained by barbed vines. Restrained creatures until they’re freed with a successful Finesse or Strength roll or by dealing at least 6 damage to the vines.
ast.target: 在林地中选定一个点。该点极近距离内的所有目标必须在敏捷反应检定中成功，否则受到 1d8+3 点物理伤害并被带刺藤蔓束缚。被束缚的生物会一直被束缚，直到通过成功的灵巧或力量检定脱困，或对藤蔓造成至少 6 点伤害。

ast.name: text
ast.source: A Young Dryad, two Sylvan Soldiers, and a number of Minor Treants equal to the number of PCs appear to confront the party for their intrusion.
ast.target: 一名幼年树精、两名林地士兵，以及数量等同于 PC 人数的次级树人出现，因队伍的闯入而前来对峙。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The Difficulty of this environment equals that of the adversary with the highest Difficulty.
ast.target: 该环境的难度等同于难度最高的对手。

ast.name: text
ast.source: When a PC starts the ambush on unsuspecting adversaries, you lose 2 Fear and the first attack roll a PC makes has advantage.
ast.target: 当PC对毫无防备的敌人发起伏击时，你失去2点Fear，并且该PC进行的第一次攻击检定具有优势。

ast.name: text
ast.source: PCs can gain advantage on a Presence Roll by off ering a handful of gold as part of the interaction.
ast.target: PC可以在互动中献上一把金币，从而在Presence Roll上获得优势。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Reveal to the PCs that one of the merchants has something they want or need, such as food from their home, a rare book, magical components, a dubious treasure map, or a magical key.
ast.target: 向PC揭示，其中一名商人拥有他们想要或需要的东西，例如家乡的食物、一本稀有书籍、魔法材料、一张可疑的藏宝图，或一把魔法钥匙。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Climbing up the cliff side uses a Progress Countdown (12). It ticks down according to the following criteria when the PCs make an action roll to climb:
ast.target: 攀爬峭壁使用Progress Countdown（12）。当PC进行攀爬的行动检定时，倒计时按以下标准减少：

ast.name: text
ast.source: Previous climbers left behind large metal rods that climbers can use to aid their ascent. If a PC using the pitons fails an action roll to climb, they can mark a Stress instead of ticking the countdown up.
ast.target: 之前的攀登者留下了大型金属杆，攀登者可用其辅助上升。若使用岩钉的PC在攀爬行动检定中失败，他们可以标记一个Stress而不是让倒计时增加。

ast.name: text
ast.source: A PC can ask the bartender, staff , or patrons about local events, rumors, and potential work with a Presence Roll. On a success, they can pick two of the below details to learn—or three if they critically succeed. On a failure, they can pick one and mark a Stress as the local carries on about something irrelevant.
ast.target: PC可以通过一次Presence Roll向酒保、工作人员或客人询问当地事件、传闻和潜在工作。成功时，他们可以从下列细节中选择两项了解——若暴击成功则选三项。失败时，他们可以选择一项，并标记一个Stress，因为当地人会继续闲聊一些无关内容。

ast.name: text
ast.source: A PC can perform one time for the guests by making a Presence Roll. On a success, they earn 1d4 handfuls of gold (2d4 if they critically succeed). On a failure, they mark a Stress.
ast.target: PC可以进行一次表演，进行一次Presence Roll。成功则获得1d4把金币（暴击成功则为2d4）。失败则标记一个Stress。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Reveal a stranger concealing their identity, lurking in a shaded booth.
ast.target: 揭示一名隐藏身份、潜伏在阴影卡座里的陌生人。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Introduce a significant NPC who wants to hire the party for something or who relates to a PC’s background.
ast.target: 引入一名重要NPC，他要雇佣队伍做某事或与某位PC的背景有关。

ast.name: text
ast.source: to have a bar fight erupt in the tavern. When a PC tries to move through the tavern while the fight persists, they must succeed on an Agility or Presence Roll or take 1d6+2 physical damage from a wild swing or thrown object. A PC can try to activate this feature by succeeding on an action roll that would provoke tavern patrons.
ast.target: 使酒馆内爆发斗殴。当斗殴持续时，PC试图穿过酒馆必须通过Agility或Presence Roll，否则会被乱拳或投掷物击中，受到1d6+2点物理伤害。PC可通过成功完成一次会激怒酒馆客人的行动检定来尝试触发此特性。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Gossip is the fastest-traveling currency in the realm. A PC can inquire about major events by making a Presence Roll. What they learn depends on the outcome of their roll, based on the following criteria:
ast.target: 流言是王国中传播最快的货币。PC可以通过一次Presence Roll询问重大事件。其获知内容取决于检定结果，按以下标准：

ast.name: text
ast.source: Another adventuring party is here, seeking the same treasure or leads as the PCs.
ast.target: 另一支冒险队伍也在这里，寻找与PC相同的宝藏或线索。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The PCs witness as agents of a local crime boss shake down a general goods store.
ast.target: PC目睹当地犯罪头目手下敲诈一家杂货铺。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Crossing the river requires the party to complete a Progress Countdown (4). A PC who rolls a failure with Fear is immediately targeted by the “Undertow” action without requiring a Fear to be spent on the feature.
ast.target: 渡河需要队伍完成Progress Countdown（4）。若PC在带有Fear的失败结果下进行检定，会立即被“Undertow”行动锁定，无需为该特性消耗Fear。

ast.name: text
ast.source: to catch a PC in the undertow. They must make an Agility Reaction Roll. On a failure, they take 1d6+1 physical damage and are moved a Close distance down the river, becoming Vulnerable until they get out of the river. On a success, they must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 让PC被暗流卷住。他们必须进行Agility Reaction Roll。失败则受到1d6+1点物理伤害，并被沿河下冲一个Close距离，在离开河流前处于Vulnerable。成功则必须标记一个Stress。

ast.name: text
ast.source: to summon a Glass Snake within Close range of a chosen PC. The Snake appears in or near the river and immediately takes the spotlight to use their “Spinning Serpent” action.
ast.target: 在选定PC的Close范围内召唤一条Glass Snake。蛇出现在河中或河边，并立即获得聚光灯以使用其“Spinning Serpent”行动。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Once per scene, each PC can mark a Stress to turn a result with Fear into a result with Hope.
ast.target: 每个场景一次，每名PC可以标记一个Stress，将带有Fear的结果转为带有Hope的结果。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The city has countless mysteries to unfold. A PC who seeks knowledge about the fallen city can make an Instinct or Knowledge Roll to learn about this place and discover (potentially haunted) loot.
ast.target: 这座城市有无数谜团待揭开。想了解陨落之城的PC可以进行Instinct或Knowledge Roll，了解此地并发现（可能闹鬼的）战利品。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Adversaries who appear here are of a ghostly form. They have resistance to physical damage and can mark a Stress to move up to Close range through solid objects.
ast.target: 出现在这里的敌人都是幽灵形态。他们对物理伤害有抗性，并可标记一个Stress穿过实体物体移动至Close范围。

ast.name: text
ast.source: to manifest the echo of a past disaster that ravaged the city. Activate a Progress Countdown (5) as the disaster replays around the PCs. To complete the countdown and escape the catastrophe, the PCs must overcome threats such as rampaging fires, stampeding civilians, collapsing buildings, or crumbling streets, while recalling history and finding clues to escape the inevitable.
ast.target: 显现曾摧毁城市的灾难回声。当灾难在PC周围重演时，启动Progress Countdown（5）。为完成倒计时并逃离灾难，PC必须克服肆虐大火、惊逃人群、倒塌建筑或崩裂街道等威胁，同时回忆历史并寻找逃离宿命的线索。

ast.name: text
ast.source: to carve the mountain with an icy torrent, causing an avalanche. All PCs in its path must succeed on an Agility or Strength Reaction Roll or be bowled over and carried down the mountain. A PC using rope, pitons, or other climbing gear gains advantage on this roll. Targets who fail are knocked down the mountain to Far range, take 2d20 physical damage, and must mark a Stress. Targets who succeed must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 用冰冷洪流切割山体，引发雪崩。路径上的所有PC必须通过Agility或Strength Reaction Roll，否则会被撞倒并卷下山。使用绳索、岩钉或其他攀登装备的PC在此检定上获得优势。失败目标会被冲下山至Far范围，受到2d20点物理伤害，并必须标记一个Stress。成功目标也必须标记一个Stress。

ast.name: text
ast.source: When the PCs enter the raptors’ hunting grounds, two Giant Eagles appear at Very Far range of a chosen PC, identifying the PCs as likely prey.
ast.target: 当PC进入猛禽的狩猎领地时，两只Giant Eagles会在选定PC的Very Far范围出现，将PC视为潜在猎物。

ast.name: text
ast.source: When a PC makes a Spellcast Roll, they must roll two Fear Dice and take the higher result.
ast.target: 当PC进行Spellcast Roll时，必须掷两颗Fear Dice并取较高结果。

ast.name: text
ast.source: PCs who approach the central tree can make a Knowledge Roll to try to identify the magic that consumed this environment.
ast.target: 接近中央巨树的PC可以进行Knowledge Roll，尝试识别吞噬此环境的魔法。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Animate vines bristling with thorns whip out from the underbrush to ensnare the PCs. A target must succeed on an Agility Reaction Roll or become Restrained and Vulnerable until they break free, clearing both conditions, with a successful Finesse or Strength Roll or by dealing 10 damage to the vines. When the target makes a roll to escape, they take 1d8+4 physical damage and lose a Hope.
ast.target: 布满尖刺的活体藤蔓从灌木中挥出，缠住PC。目标必须通过Agility Reaction Roll，否则会陷入Restrained和Vulnerable，直到成功进行Finesse或Strength Roll或对藤蔓造成10点伤害以挣脱并清除两种状态。目标进行逃脱检定时，受到1d8+4点物理伤害并失去1点Hope。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Warped animals wreathed in indigo flame trample through a point of your choice. All targets within Close range of that point must make an Agility Reaction Roll. Targets who fail take 3d12+3 physical damage. Targets who succeed take half damage instead.
ast.target: 被靛蓝火焰缠绕的扭曲动物从你选择的一点践踏而过。该点近距离内的所有目标必须进行敏捷反应检定。失败的目标受到3d12+3点物理伤害。成功的目标则只受一半伤害。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Countdown (Loop ). When the PCs enter the Burning Heart of the Woods, activate the countdown. When it triggers, all characters must make a Strength or Instinct Reaction Roll. Targets who fail take 4d6+5 direct physical damage. Targes who succeed take half damage. Protective masks or clothes give advantage on the reaction roll.
ast.target: 倒计时（Loop ）。当PC进入森林燃烧之心时，启动倒计时。触发时，所有角色必须进行力量或直觉反应检定。失败的目标受到4d6+5点直接物理伤害。成功的目标则只受一半伤害。防护面具或衣物使反应检定具有优势。

ast.name: text
ast.source: A PC can find or recall a secret way into the castle with a successful Instinct or Knowledge Roll.
ast.target: PC可以通过成功的直觉或知识检定找到或回忆起进入城堡的秘密通道。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Consequence Countdown (6). The attacking force deploys siege weapons to try to raze the defenders’ fortifications. Activate the countdown when the siege begins (for a protracted siege, make this a long-term countdown instead). When it triggers, the defenders’ fortifications have been breached and the attackers flood inside. You gain 2 Fear, then shift to the Pitched Battle environment and spotlight it.
ast.target: 后果倒计时（6）。进攻方部署攻城器械试图夷平守军的防御工事。攻城开始时启动倒计时（若为持久围攻，则改为长期倒计时）。触发时，守军的工事被突破，进攻者涌入。你获得2点恐惧，然后切换到阵地战环境并将其聚焦。

ast.name: text
ast.source: When an adversary is defeated, you can spend a Fear to have a stray attack from a siege weapon hit a point on the battlefield. All targets within Very Close range of that point must make an Agility Reaction Roll.
ast.target: 当一个对手被击败时，你可以花费1点恐惧，让一发攻城器械的流弹击中战场上的一点。该点极近距离内的所有目标必须进行敏捷反应检定。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The attacking force raises the stakes by lighting a fire, stealing a valuable asset, kidnapping an important person, or killing the populace.
ast.target: 进攻方通过点火、偷走贵重资产、绑架重要人物或屠杀民众来加码。

ast.name: text
ast.source: as a mage from one side uses large-scale destructive magic. Pick a point on the battlefield within Very Far range of the mage. All targets within Close range of that point must make an Agility Reaction Roll. Targets who fail take 3d12+8 magic damage and must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 当一方的法师使用大规模毁灭魔法时。选择战场上距离法师极远距离内的一点。该点近距离内的所有目标必须进行敏捷反应检定。失败的目标受到3d12+8点魔法伤害并必须标记1点压力。

ast.name: text
ast.source: to force a PC to make a Strength Reaction Roll. On a failure, they take 4d10 direct magic damage. On a success, they must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 迫使一名PC进行力量反应检定。失败时，他们受到4d10点直接魔法伤害。成功时，他们必须标记1点压力。

ast.name: text
ast.source: to summon an Outer Realms Abomination, an Outer Realms Corruptor, and 2d6 Outer Realms Thralls, who appear at Close range of a chosen PC in defiance of logic and causality. Immediately spotlight one of these adversaries, and you can spend an additional Fear to automatically succeed on that adversary’s standard attack.
ast.target: 召唤一只外界憎恶体、一名外界腐化者和2d6名外界奴仆，它们无视逻辑与因果地出现在所选PC近距离范围内。立即聚焦其中一个对手，你还可以额外花费1点恐惧，使该对手的标准攻击自动成功。

ast.name: text
ast.source: On a result with Fear, you can ask the PC to describe which of their fears the Chaos Realm evokes as a vision of reality unmakes and reconstitutes itself to the PC. The PC loses a Hope. If it is their last Hope, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 若结果带有恐惧，你可以要求PC描述混沌界在现实瓦解并重构的幻象中唤起了他们哪一种恐惧。该PC失去1点希望。如果这是他们最后的希望，你获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: text
ast.source: When a PC critically succeeds, they can spend 2 Hope to refresh an ability normally limited by uses (such as once per rest, once per session).
ast.target: 当PC暴击成功时，他们可以花费2点希望来刷新一个通常受使用次数限制的能力（如每次休息一次、每次会话一次）。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Spend 2 Fear to summon 1d4+2 Fallen Shock Troops that appear within Close range of the Usurper to assist their divine siege. Immediately spotlight the Shock Troops to use a “Group Attack” action.
ast.target: 花费2点恐惧召唤1d4+2名堕落突击部队，它们在篡位者近距离范围内出现，协助其神圣围攻。立即聚焦突击部队以使用“群体攻击”动作。

ast.name: text
ast.source: On any failure with Fear against the Usurper, the PC must mark 1d4 Stress from the backlash of magical power.
ast.target: 对抗篡位者的任何带有恐惧的失败，PC都必须因魔力反噬标记1d4点压力。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The PCs can find imperial subjects, vassals, and supplicants in the court, each vying for favor, seeking proximity to power, exchanging favors for loyalty, and elevating their status above others’. Some might be desperate to undermine their rivals, while others might even be open to discussions that verge on sedition.
ast.target: PC们可以在宫廷中找到帝国臣民、附庸与请愿者，每个人都在争宠、接近权力、以恩惠换取忠诚，并抬高自己高于他人。有些人可能急于削弱对手，而另一些人甚至愿意进行接近煽动叛乱的讨论。

ast.name: text
ast.source: A feature or action that clears HP requires spending a Hope to use. If it already costs Hope, a PC must spend an additional Hope.
ast.target: 清除生命值的特性或行动需要花费1点希望才能使用。若它本就消耗希望，PC必须额外花费1点希望。

ast.name: text
ast.source: A PC can investigate the library and laboratory and make a Knowledge Roll to learn information related to arcana, local history, and the Necromancer’s plans.
ast.target: PC可以调查图书馆和实验室，并进行知识检定以了解与奥术、本地历史及死灵法师计划相关的信息。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Once per scene, roll a d4. Each undead within Far range of the Necromancer can clear HP and Stress equal to the result rolled. The undead can choose how that number is divided between HP and Stress.
ast.target: 每个场景一次，掷一个d4。死灵法师远距离范围内的每个亡灵都可以清除等于掷骰结果的生命值和压力。亡灵可以选择该数值在生命值与压力之间的分配方式。

ast.name: text
ast.source: to summon 1d6 Rotted Zombies, two Perfected Zombies, or a Zombie Legion, who appear at Close range of a chosen PC.
ast.target: 召唤1d6只腐烂僵尸、两只完美僵尸或一支僵尸军团，它们出现在所选PC的近距离范围内。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Everyone is here to have a good time. PCs have advantage on Presence rolls to socialize with other revelers.
ast.target: 所有人都是来尽兴的。PC在与其他狂欢者社交时的风度检定具有优势。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Spend the spotlight to have the host of the feast kick off the entertainment portion of the evening. All PCs can make an action roll to initiate a performance, competition, or other lighthearted diversion. Each PC who succeeds becomes an Honored Guest. Until the grand feast ends, an Honored Guest can claim one boon from the host, then clear the condition.
ast.target: 花费聚焦，让宴会主人开启当晚的娱乐环节。所有PC都可以进行一次行动检定来发起表演、竞赛或其他轻松的消遣。每个成功的PC成为贵宾。在盛大宴会结束前，贵宾可以向主人索取一项恩惠，然后清除该状态。

ast.name: text
ast.source: After a long night, the partygoers start fi ltering out. When the feast concludes, all PCs who participated in the festivities clear all Stress and gain a Hope. Additionally, each Honored Guest clears all HP and gains an additional Hope, then clears the condition. PCs who overindulged must succeed on a Strength Reaction Roll or become Hungover until their next rest. Hungover PCs take a −1 penalty to all action rolls.
ast.target: 漫长一夜后，聚会者开始陆续离开。宴会结束时，所有参与庆典的PC清除所有压力并获得1点希望。此外，每位贵宾清除所有生命值并额外获得1点希望，然后清除该状态。过度纵酒的PC必须成功通过力量反应检定，否则将宿醉直到下次休息。宿醉的PC在所有行动检定上承受−1惩罚。

ast.name: text
ast.source: When the Progress Countdown triggers, the party acquires the object of the Heist and must succeed on a group action roll to escape without being caught. On a failure, each PC marks a Stress and takes 2d12 direct damage.
ast.target: 当进度倒计时触发时，队伍获得劫案的目标物，并必须成功通过一次群体行动检定以在不被抓到的情况下逃脱。失败时，每位PC标记1点压力并受到2d12点直接伤害。

ast.name: text
ast.source: When the Consequence Countdown triggers, the party is discovered and the location enters High Alert. Immediately summon a number of Tier 2 adversaries equal to the number of PCs in the scene and spotlight one. While this environment is on High Alert, all adversaries gain a +1 bonus to their Difficulty.
ast.target: 当后果倒计时触发时，队伍被发现，地点进入高度警戒。立即召唤等于场景中PC数量的2级对手并聚焦其中一个。此环境处于高度警戒时，所有对手的难度获得+1加值。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The crystals here reverberate with magical energy. A PC can make a downtime move to try and Attune to the environment with a successful Spellcast Roll. Spellcast Rolls made by an Attuned PC inside the Crystal Wasteland have advantage. A PC clears the condition when they leave the wasteland.
ast.target: 此处的水晶与魔法能量共鸣。PC可以进行一次休整行动，通过成功的施法检定来尝试与环境调谐。已调谐的PC在水晶荒原内进行的施法检定具有优势。PC离开荒原时清除该状态。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Strange, localized phenomena dot the landscape, warping distance and direction. Spend a Fear to alter the gravity at a point of your choice. All targets within Close range of that point must make a Knowledge Reaction Roll to calculate their new trajectories. Targets who fail take 3d8+4 physical damage as they are thrown up and away. Targets who succeed must mark a Stress or take half damage.
ast.target: 奇异的局部现象点缀着地貌，扭曲距离与方向。花费1点恐惧来改变你选择的一点的重力。该点近距离内的所有目标必须进行知识反应检定以计算新的轨迹。失败的目标在被抛向上方与远处时受到3d8+4点物理伤害。成功的目标必须标记1点压力或仅受一半伤害。

ast.name: text
ast.source: to have any number of PCs glimpse a refl ection in the crystal of who they once were or might become. Each target makes a Fate Roll. Targets who succeed see a vision of their better self and can replace one Experience. Targets see a vision of their dark past–or an even darker future–and must mark a Stress, and you gain a fear.
ast.target: 让任意数量的PC在水晶中瞥见他们曾经是谁或可能成为谁的倒影。每个目标进行一次命运检定。检定成功的目标会看到更好的自己，可以替换一条经历。目标会看到他们黑暗的过去——或更黑暗的未来——并必须标记一项压力，而你获得一项恐惧。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The city of Convergence has a portal or door to every plane of existence.
ast.target: 汇聚之城拥有通往每个存在位面的传送门或门户。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Make an attack against a target within Close range. On a success, deal 1d8+4 physical damage and pull the target into Melee.
ast.target: 对近距离内的目标进行一次攻击。成功则造成1d8+4点物理伤害，并将目标拉入近战。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The bandits post a constant watch, mostly directed outside the camp. Entrance will require stealth (Finesse), deception (Presence), or special information (Knowledge).
ast.target: 强盗一直有人放哨，主要监视营地外部。进入需要潜行（灵巧）、欺瞒（气场）或特殊信息（知识）。

ast.name: text
ast.source: to have a pack of 1d4+2 hungry Strixwolves infiltrate the hideout, desperate for food.
ast.target: 让一群1d4+2只饥饿的斯崔克斯狼潜入藏身处，急需食物。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Reveal that the path ahead has been blocked by the shifting of a great Sablewood tree. The party can dig around the root (Finesse), try to cut through it (Strength), or double back to find another path (Instinct).
ast.target: 揭示前方道路被一棵巨大的黑檀木树移动而阻断。队伍可以绕着树根挖掘（灵巧）、尝试砍开（力量），或折返寻找另一条路（本能）。

ast.name: text
ast.source: to introduce a number of Jagged Knife Lackeys equal to the size of the party plus two Jagged Knife Bandits and a Jagged Knife Lieutenant seeking a 'toll' of two handfuls of gold per character for passing through their "protected territory".
ast.target: 引入数量等同于队伍规模的锯刃帮小喽啰，外加两名锯刃帮强盗和一名锯刃帮中尉，要求每名角色支付两把金币作为通过其“保护领地”的“过路费”。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Any overnight visitor is taken in by a family and given shelter for three nights. During this time, the guest's needs have priority and they can use anything that belongs to their hosts. After three nights, the visitors must trade families or leave the town.
ast.target: 任何过夜的访客都会被一户人家接纳并提供三晚住宿。在此期间，客人的需求优先，他们可以使用东道主的任何物品。三晚之后，访客必须更换家庭或离开城镇。

ast.name: text
ast.source: to summon two additional Ancient Skeletons from the ground within Very Close range of a PC.
ast.target: 在PC的超近距离内从地面召唤另外两具远古骷髅。
